18  Caption = 'Line No.';

20  field(3; "Cost Type"; Code[20])
21  {
22  Caption = 'Cost Type';
23  NotBlank = true;
24  TableRelation = "TSRD Calc. Cost Type"."Code";
25 
26  trigger OnValidate()
27  var
28  CalcCostType: Record "TSRD Calc. Cost Type";
29  begin
30  if CalcCostType.Get("Cost Type") then begin
31  Rec.Description := CalcCostType.Description;
32  Rec."Transfer to Purchase" := CalcCostType."Transfer to Purchase";
33  end;
34  end;
35  }
36  field(4; Description; Text[100])
37  {
38  Caption = 'Description';
39  OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
40  }
41  field(5; Amount; Decimal)
42  {
43  BlankZero = true;
44  Caption = 'Amount';
45 
46  trigger OnValidate()
47  begin
48  if "Base Amount Type" <> "Base Amount Type"::" " then
49  FieldError("Base Amount Type");
50  end;
51  }
52  field(6; "Base Amount Type"; Enum "TSRD Calc. Base Amount Type")
53  {
54  Caption = 'Base Amount Type';
55 
56  trigger OnValidate()
57  begin
58  if "Base Amount Type" = "Base Amount Type"::" " then begin
59  Percentage := 0;
60  UpdateCostAmount();
61  end else
62  Amount := 0;
63  end;
64  }
65  field(7; Percentage; Decimal)
66  {
67  AutoFormatExpression = '<precision, 1:2><standard format,0>%';
68  AutoFormatType = 10;
69  BlankZero = true;
70  Caption = 'Percentage';
71  DecimalPlaces = 0 : 5;
72 
73  trigger OnValidate()
74  begin
75  Percentage /= 100;
76  UpdateCostAmount();
77  end;
78  }
79  field(8; "Allocate to Service Item"; Code[20])
80  {
81  AccessByPermission = tabledata "Service Item" = R;
82  Caption = 'Allocate to Service Item';
83  OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
84  TableRelation = "Service Item";
85  }
86  field(9; "Allocate to Trade No."; Code[20])
87  {
88  Caption = 'Allocate to Trade No.';
89  TableRelation = "TSRM Trade No."."No." where("Service Item No." = field("Allocate to Service Item"));
90  }
91  field(10; "Equipment Line No."; Integer)
92  {
93  Caption = 'Equipment Line No.';
94  TableRelation = "TSRD Calc. External Equipment"."Line No." where("Forecast No." = field("Forecast No."));
95  }
96  field(11; "Transfer to Purchase"; Boolean)
97  {
98  Caption = 'Transfer to Purchase';
99  }

101  {
102  Caption = 'Purchase Document No.';

104  OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
105  }

108  Caption = 'Purchase Document Type';

110  }
111+ field(30; "Charging Method"; Enum "TSRD Calc. Charging Method")
112+ {
113+ Caption = 'Charging Method';
114+
115+ trigger OnValidate()
116+ var
117+ CalcCostType: Record "TSRD Calc. Cost Type";
118+ MustHaveSalesItemChargeErr: Label 'Cost Type %1 must have a Sales Item Charge assigned to allow %2.', Comment = '%1 = cost type code, %2 = charging method';
119+ begin
120+ if "Charging Method" = "Charging Method"::"Calc. Separately" then begin
121+ if CalcCostType.Get("Cost Type") then
122+ if CalcCostType."Sales Item Charge" = '' then
123+ Error(MustHaveSalesItemChargeErr, "Cost Type", Format("Charging Method"::"Calc. Separately"));
124+ end else begin
125+ "Sales Price" := 0;
126+ "Margin %" := 0;
127+ "Margin Amount" := 0;
128+ end;
129+ end;
130+ }
131+ field(31; "Sales Price"; Decimal)
132+ {
133+ BlankZero = true;
134+ Caption = 'Sales Price';
135+
136+ trigger OnValidate()
137+ begin
138+ TestChargingMethodSeparate();
139+ UpdateMarginFromSalesPrice();
140+ end;
141+ }
142+ field(32; "Margin %"; Decimal)
143+ {
144+ AutoFormatExpression = '<precision, 1:2><standard format,0>';
145+ AutoFormatType = 10;
146+ BlankZero = true;
147+ Caption = 'Margin %';
148+ CaptionClass = SalesReceivablesSetup.GetMarginCaption('', ' %');
149+
150+ trigger OnValidate()
151+ begin
152+ TestChargingMethodSeparate();
153+ UpdateSalesPriceFromMarginPercentage();
154+ end;
155+ }
156+ field(33; "Margin Amount"; Decimal)
157+ {
158+ BlankZero = true;
159+ Caption = 'Margin Amount';
160+ CaptionClass = SalesReceivablesSetup.GetMarginCaption();
161+
162+ trigger OnValidate()
163+ begin
164+ TestChargingMethodSeparate();
165+ "Sales Price" := Amount + "Margin Amount";
166+ UpdateMarginFromSalesPrice();
167+ end;
168+ }
169  }
170 
171  keys
172  {
173  key(PK; "Forecast No.", "Line No.")
174  {
175  Clustered = true;
176  }
177  }
178 
179  trigger OnInsert()
180  begin
181  TestForecastStatusOpen();
182  end;
183 
184  trigger OnModify()
185  begin
186  TestForecastStatusOpen();
187  end;
188 
189  internal procedure TestForecastStatusOpen()
190  begin
191  GetCalcForecast("Forecast No.");
192  CalcForecast.TestStatusOpen();
193  end;
194 
195  local procedure GetCalcForecast(ForecastNo: Code[20])
196  begin
197  if not HasCalcForecast then
198  HasCalcForecast := CalcForecast.Get(ForecastNo);
199  end;
200 
201  local procedure UpdateCostAmount()
202  var
203  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
204  begin
205  Amount := CalcForecastMgt.GetCostAmount(Rec);
206  end;
207 
208  procedure GetNextLineNo(): Integer
209  var
210  CalcCost: Record "TSRD Calc. Cost";
211  begin
212  CalcCost.SetRange("Forecast No.", "Forecast No.");
213  if CalcCost.IsEmpty() then
214  exit(10000);
215  CalcCost.FindLast();
216  exit(CalcCost."Line No." + 10000);
217  end;
218 
219+ local procedure TestChargingMethodSeparate()
220+ var
221+ ChargingMethodErr: Label 'Sales Price, Margin %% and Margin Amount can only be edited when %1 is %2.', Comment = '%1 = field caption, %2 = enum value';
222+ begin
223+ if "Charging Method" <> "Charging Method"::"Calc. Separately" then
224+ Error(ChargingMethodErr, FieldCaption("Charging Method"), Format("Charging Method"::"Calc. Separately"));
225+ end;
226+
227+ local procedure UpdateSalesPriceFromMarginPercentage()
228+ var
229+ CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
230+ begin
231+ SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
232+ "Sales Price" := Round(CalcForecastMgt.GetSalesPriceWithMargin(Amount, "Margin %", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model"), 0.01);
233+ "Margin Amount" := "Sales Price" - Amount;
234+ end;
235+
236+ local procedure UpdateMarginFromSalesPrice()
237+ var
238+ CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
239+ begin
240+ SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
241+ "Margin Amount" := "Sales Price" - Amount;
242+ "Margin %" := CalcForecastMgt.GetMarginPercentage(Amount, "Sales Price", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model");
243+ end;
244+
245  var
246  CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
247+ SalesReceivablesSetup: Record "Sales & Receivables Setup";
248  HasCalcForecast: Boolean;
249 }

+7 −0
1 table 5446001 "TSRD Calc. External Equipment"
2 {
3  Caption = 'Additional Configuration';
4  DataClassification = CustomerContent;
5  DrillDownPageId = "TSRD Calc. Ext Equip Lookup";
6  LookupPageId = "TSRD Calc. Ext Equip Lookup";
7 
8  //Always update archive table as well!
9 
10  fields
11  {
12  field(1; "Forecast No."; Code[20])
13  {
14  Caption = 'Calculation Worksheet No.';
15  OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
16  TableRelation = "TSRD Calc. Forecast"."No.";
17  }
18  field(2; "Line No."; Integer)
19  {
20  Caption = 'Line No.';
21  }
22  field(6; "No."; Code[20])
23  {
24  Caption = 'No.';
25  OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
26  TableRelation = if (Type = const(Item)) Item."No."
27  else
28  if (Type = const("Service Item")) "Service Item"."No." where("TSRM In Stock As" = filter("Current Asset" | "Fixed Asset"))
29  else
30  if (Type = const(Comment)) "Standard Text";
31 
32  trigger OnValidate()
33  var
34  Item: Record Item;
35  ServiceItem: Record "Service Item";
36  StandardText: Record "Standard Text";
37  TempCalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment" temporary;
38  Vendor: Record Vendor;
39  ItemTemplMgt: Codeunit "Item Templ. Mgt.";
40  DataHintMgt: Codeunit "TSR Data Hint Mgt.";
41  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
42  EquipmentMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Equipment Mgt.";
43  ServiceItemDataMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Item Data mgt";
44  UsedPartsTaxMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Used Parts Tax Mgt.";
45  VendorItemNoMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Vendor Item No. Mgt.";
46  begin
47  CalcForecastMgt.RemoveAttachedCommentLinesEquipment(Rec);
48  TempCalcExternalEquipment := Rec;
49  Init();
50  Type := TempCalcExternalEquipment.Type;
51  "No." := TempCalcExternalEquipment."No.";
52  "Vendor No." := TempCalcExternalEquipment."Vendor No.";
53  "Vendor Name" := TempCalcExternalEquipment."Vendor Name";
54  "Purchase Order Type" := TempCalcExternalEquipment."Purchase Order Type";
55  "Responsibility Center" := TempCalcExternalEquipment."Responsibility Center";
56  "Location Code" := TempCalcExternalEquipment."Location Code";
57  if "Line No." = 0 then
58  "Line No." := Rec.GetNextLineNo();
59  case Type of
60  Type::Item:
61  begin
62  if not Item.Get("No.") then
63  exit;
64  Description := Item.Description;
65  if Vendor.Get(Item."Vendor No.") then
66  Rec.Validate("Vendor No.", Vendor."No.");
67  Quantity := 1;
68  Validate("Unit of Measure", Item."Base Unit of Measure");
69  UsedPartsTaxMgt.UpdateLineOnAfterValidateNo(Rec);
70  CalcForecastMgt.InsertExtendedTextEquipment(Rec);
71  if CurrFieldNo = Rec.FieldNo("No.") then
72  DataHintMgt.DisplayMasterDataHints(Rec, CurrFieldNo);
73  end;
74  Type::"Service Item":
75  begin
76  if not ServiceItem.Get("No.") then
77  exit;
78  case ServiceItem."TSRM In Stock As" of
79  ServiceItem."TSRM In Stock As"::"Current Asset":
80  if ServiceItem."Item No." = '' then begin
81  Commit();
82  ItemTemplMgt.InsertItemFromTemplate(Item);
83  ServiceItem.Validate("Item No.", Item."No.");
84  ServiceItem.Modify();
85  end;
86  ServiceItem."TSRM In Stock As"::"Fixed Asset":
87  ServiceItem.TestField("TSRM Fixed Asset No.");
88  end;
89  Description := ServiceItem.Description;
90  "List Price" := ServiceItem."Sales Unit Price";
91  "Direct Unit Cost" := ServiceItem."Sales Unit Cost";
92  Validate(Quantity, 1);
93  "Unit of Measure" := ServiceItem."Unit of Measure Code";
94  if CurrFieldNo = Rec.FieldNo("No.") then
95  DataHintMgt.DisplayMasterDataHints(Rec, CurrFieldNo);
96  EquipmentMgt.FillAttachedEquipmentLines(Rec);
97  ServiceItemDataMgt.FillServiceItemData(Rec);
98  end;
99  Type::Comment:
100  begin
101  StandardText.Get("No.");
102  Description := StandardText.Description;
103  CalcForecastMgt.InsertExtendedTextEquipment(Rec);
104  end;
105  end;
106  VendorItemNoMgt.TransferVendorItemNo(Rec);
107  end;
108  }
109  field(7; "Unit of Measure"; Code[10])
110  {
111  Caption = 'Unit of Measure';
112  TableRelation = if ("No." = filter(<> ''), Type = const(Item)) "Item Unit of Measure".Code where("Item No." = field("No."))
113  else
114  if ("No." = filter(<> ''), Type = const("Service Item")) "Service Item"."Unit of Measure Code" where("No." = field("No."))
115  else
116  "Unit of Measure".Code;
117 
118  trigger OnValidate()
119  var
120  Item: Record Item;
121  ItemUnitofMeasure: Record "Item Unit of Measure";
122  begin
123  if "Unit of Measure" = xRec."Unit of Measure" then
124  exit;
125 
126  if "Unit of Measure" = '' then
127  exit;
128 
129  if Type = Type::Item then begin
130  Item.Get("No.");
131 
132  ItemUnitofMeasure.Get(Item."No.", "Unit of Measure");
133 
134  if Item."Unit Price" <> 0 then
135  Validate("List Price", Item."Unit Price" * ItemUnitofMeasure."Qty. per Unit of Measure" * Quantity)
136  else
137  if "List Price" = 0 then
138  Validate("List Price", Item."Unit Cost" * ItemUnitofMeasure."Qty. per Unit of Measure" * Quantity);
139  Validate("Direct Unit Cost", Item."Unit Cost" * ItemUnitofMeasure."Qty. per Unit of Measure" * Quantity);
140  end;
141  end;
142  }
143  field(9; Type; Enum "TSRD Calc. Ext. Equipment Type")
144  {
145  Caption = 'Type';
146  trigger OnValidate()
147  var
148  TempCalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment" temporary;
149  begin
150  TempCalcExternalEquipment := Rec;
151  Init();
152  if TempCalcExternalEquipment.Type <> TempCalcExternalEquipment.Type::Comment then begin
153  Rec.InitOrderType();
154  Rec.InitResponsibilityCenter();
155  end;
156  Type := TempCalcExternalEquipment.Type;
157  end;
158  }
159  field(10; Description; Text[100])
160  {
161  Caption = 'Description';
162  OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
163  }
164  field(12; Quantity; Decimal)
165  {
166  BlankZero = true;
167  Caption = 'Quantity';
168 
169  trigger OnValidate()
170  var
171  UsedPartsTaxMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Used Parts Tax Mgt.";
172  WrongQuantityErr: Label 'Quantity cannot be more than 1 when Type is Service Item.';
173  begin
174  if (Quantity > 1) and (Type = Type::"Service Item") then
175  Error(WrongQuantityErr);
176  UpdateLineAmounts();
177  UpdateMargin();
178  UsedPartsTaxMgt.CheckIsQuantityChangeAllowed(Rec);
179  end;
180  }
181  field(13; "List Price"; Decimal)
182  {
183  BlankZero = true;
184  Caption = 'List Price';
185 
186  trigger OnValidate()
187  begin
188  UpdateDirectUnitCost();
189  UpdateLineAmounts();
190  UpdateMargin();
191  end;
192  }
193  field(14; "Direct Unit Cost"; Decimal)
194  {
195  BlankZero = true;
196  Caption = 'Direct Unit Cost';
197 
198  trigger OnValidate()
199  begin
200  UpdateDiscount();
201  UpdateLineAmounts();
202  UpdateMarginAmount();
203  end;
204  }
205  field(15; "Line Amount"; Decimal)
206  {
207  BlankZero = true;
208  Caption = 'Line Amount';
209 
210  trigger OnValidate()
211  begin
212  UpdateMargin();
213  end;
214  }
215  field(16; "Discount %"; Decimal)
216  {
217  AutoFormatExpression = '<precision, 1:2><standard format,0>';
218  AutoFormatType = 10;
219  BlankZero = true;
220  Caption = 'Discount % (List Price)';
221 
222  trigger OnValidate()
223  begin
224  UpdateDirectUnitCost();
225  UpdateLineAmounts();
226  UpdateMargin();
227  end;
228  }
229  field(17; "Margin %"; Decimal)
230  {
231  AutoFormatExpression = '<precision, 1:2><standard format,0>';
232  AutoFormatType = 10;
233  BlankZero = true;
234  Caption = 'Margin %';
235  CaptionClass = SalesReceivablesSetup.GetMarginCaption('', ' %');
236 
237  trigger OnValidate()
238  var
239  SalesReceivablesSetup: Record "Sales & Receivables Setup";
240  begin
241  SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
242  IsMarginPercentageViable(SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model");
243  UpdateLineAmounts();
244  UpdateMarginAmount();
245  end;
246  }
247  field(19; "Margin Amount"; Decimal)
248  {
249  BlankZero = true;
250  Caption = 'Margin Amount';
251  CaptionClass = SalesReceivablesSetup.GetMarginCaption();
252  Editable = false;
253  }
254  field(30; "Calculated Sales Price"; Decimal)
255  {
256  BlankZero = true;
257  Caption = 'Calculated Sales Price';
258  ObsoleteState = Pending;
259  ObsoleteTag = '2402.250800';
260  ObsoleteReason = 'This field has no functionality and is not required for Calc. External Equipment.';
261  Editable = false;
262  }
263  field(31; "Calculate Separately"; Boolean)
264  {
265  Caption = 'Calculate Separately';
266+ ObsoleteReason = 'Replaced by Charging Method. #29748';
267+ ObsoleteState = Pending;
268+ ObsoleteTag = '2602.260200';
269 
270  trigger OnValidate()
271  begin
272  if "Calculate Separately" then begin
273  Validate("Show in Sales Document", true);
274  CalcForecast.Get("Forecast No.");
275  CalcForecast.TestField("Fix Price allowed", false);
276  end else
277  Validate("Margin %", 0);
278  end;
279  }
280  field(32; "Show in Sales Document"; Boolean)
281  {
282  Caption = 'Show in Sales Document';
283  InitValue = true;
284 
285  trigger OnValidate()
286  begin
287  UpdateShowInSalesOnLinkedExtEquipmentLines();
288  end;
289  }
290  field(33; "Comments exist"; Boolean)
291  {
292  BlankZero = true;
293  CalcFormula = exist("TSRD Sale Forecast Comment" where("Comment Type" = const("External Equipment"), "No." = field("Forecast No."),
294  "Document Line No." = field("Line No.")));
295  Caption = 'Comments exist';
296  Editable = false;
297  FieldClass = FlowField;
298  }
299  field(36; "Attached to Line No."; Integer)
300  {
301  Caption = 'Attached to Line No.';
302  }
303  field(40; "Vendor No."; Code[20])
304  {
305  Caption = 'Vendor No.';
306  OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
307  TableRelation = Vendor."No.";
308 
309  trigger OnValidate()
310  var
311  Vendor: Record Vendor;
312  begin
313  if "Vendor No." = xRec."Vendor No." then
314  exit;
315  if "Vendor No." <> '' then begin
316  Vendor.Get("Vendor No.");
317  "Vendor Name" := Vendor.Name;
318  end else
319  "Vendor Name" := '';
320  InitResponsibilityCenter();
321  end;
322  }
323  field(41; "Vendor Name"; Text[100])
324  {
325  Caption = 'Vendor Name';
326  OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
327  trigger OnLookup()
328  var
329  Vendor: Record Vendor;
330  begin
331  CheckIsChangingOfVendorNameAllowed();
332  if Page.RunModal(0, Vendor) = Action::LookupOK then begin
333  if Vendor.Name = '' then
334  Vendor.FieldError(Name);
335  Rec.Validate("Vendor No.", Vendor."No.");
336  end;
337  end;
338 
339  trigger OnValidate()
340  var
341  Vendor: Record Vendor;
342  HelperTools: Codeunit "TSR Helper Tools";
343  LookupVar: Variant;
344  begin
345  CheckIsChangingOfVendorNameAllowed();
346  if "Vendor Name" <> '' then begin
347  LookupVar := Vendor;
348  if not HelperTools.FindRecordUsingUpToTwoFields(LookupVar, "Vendor Name", Vendor.FieldNo("No."), Vendor.FieldNo(Name)) then
349  Error('');
350  Vendor := LookupVar;
351  if Vendor.Name = '' then
352  Vendor.FieldError(Name);
353  Rec.Validate("Vendor No.", Vendor."No.");
354  end else
355  Rec.Validate("Vendor No.", '');
356  end;
357  }
358  field(50; "Workshop Line No."; Integer)
359  {
360  BlankZero = true;
361  Caption = 'Services to Line No.';
362  Editable = false;
363  }
364  field(51; "Linked to Workshop"; Boolean)
365  {
366  CalcFormula = exist("TSRD Calc. Workshop" where("Line No." = field("Workshop Line No."),
367  "Forecast No." = field("Forecast No.")));
368  Caption = 'Linked to Services';
369  Editable = false;
370  FieldClass = FlowField;
371  }

396  field(67; "Discounted Sales Price"; Decimal)
397  {
398  Caption = 'Discounted Sales Price';
399  DataClassification = CustomerContent;
400  Editable = false;
401  ObsoleteReason = 'This field was not needed for the price options feature. #17865';
402  ObsoleteState = Pending;
403  ObsoleteTag = '2402';
404  }
405  field(70; "Vendor Item No."; Text[50])
406  {
407  Caption = 'Vendor Item No.';
408  OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
409  }
410  field(75; "Purchase Order Type"; Code[10])
411  {
412  Caption = 'Purchase Order Type';
413  TableRelation = "Service Order Type".Code where("TSR Purchase" = const(true));
414  }
415  field(80; "Responsibility Center"; Code[10])
416  {
417  Caption = 'Responsibility Center';
418  TableRelation = "Responsibility Center".Code;
419 
420  trigger OnLookup()
421  var
422  RespCenterSetupMgt: Codeunit "TSR Resp. Center Setup Mgt";
423  RespCenterCode: Code[10];
424  begin
425  RespCenterCode := RespCenterSetupMgt.LookUpRespCenter("TSR Resp. Center Area"::Purchase);
426  if RespCenterCode <> '' then
427  Rec.Validate("Responsibility Center", RespCenterCode);
428  end;
429 
430  trigger OnValidate()
431  var
432  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
433  RespCenterSetupMgt: Codeunit "TSR Resp. Center Setup Mgt";
434  begin
435  RespCenterSetupMgt.CheckRespCenter(Rec."Responsibility Center", "TSR Resp. Center Area"::Purchase);
436  CalcForecastMgt.SetLocationFromResponsibilityCenter(Rec."Location Code", Rec."Responsibility Center");
437  end;
438  }
439  field(85; "Location Code"; Code[10])
440  {
441  Caption = 'Location Code';
442  TableRelation = Location;
443  }
444  field(90; "Service Item Doc. Data Comment"; Boolean)
445  {
446  Caption = 'Service Item Document Data Comment';
447  Editable = false;
448  }
449  field(95; "Status (Purchase)"; Enum "TSRM Status(Purchase)")
450  {
451  Caption = 'Status (Purchase)';
452  Editable = false;
453  ObsoleteReason = 'Table field not needed #24654';
454  ObsoleteState = Pending;
455  ObsoleteTag = '2302.241100';
456  }
457  field(100; "Attached Equipment"; Boolean)
458  {
459  Caption = 'Attached Equipmen';
460  Editable = false;
461  }
462  field(110; "Linked to Service Item"; Boolean)
463  {
464  Caption = 'Linked to Service Item';
465  }
466  field(120; "Line Action"; Enum "TSRD Service Line Action")
467  {
468  Caption = 'Line Action';
469  ValuesAllowed = " ", "Attach", "Cap. Service";
470+ ObsoleteReason = 'Replaced by Charging Method. #29748';
471+ ObsoleteState = Pending;
472+ ObsoleteTag = '2602.260200';
473+ }
474+ field(130; "Charging Method"; Enum "TSRD Calc. Ext. Charging Method")
475+ {
476+ Caption = 'Charging Method';
477+
478+ trigger OnValidate()
479+ begin
480+ case "Charging Method" of
481+ "Charging Method"::"Calc. Separately":
482+ begin
483+ CalcForecast.Get("Forecast No.");
484+ CalcForecast.TestField("Fix Price allowed", false);
485+ Validate("Show in Sales Document", true);
486+ "Calculate Separately" := true;
487+ "Line Action" := "Line Action"::" ";
488+ end;
489+ "Charging Method"::"Cap. Service":
490+ begin
491+ "Calculate Separately" := false;
492+ "Line Action" := "Line Action"::"Cap. Service";
493+ Validate("Margin %", 0);
494+ end;
495+ "Charging Method"::Attach:
496+ begin
497+ "Calculate Separately" := false;
498+ "Line Action" := "Line Action"::Attach;
499+ Validate("Margin %", 0);
500+ end;
501+ "Charging Method"::Included:
502+ begin
503+ "Calculate Separately" := false;
504+ "Line Action" := "Line Action"::" ";
505+ Validate("Margin %", 0);
506+ end;
507+ "Charging Method"::" ":
508+ begin
509+ "Calculate Separately" := false;
510+ "Line Action" := "Line Action"::" ";
511+ Validate("Margin %", 0);
512+ end;
513+ end;
514+ end;
515  }
516  }
517 
518  keys
519  {
520  key(PK; "Forecast No.", "Line No.")
521  {
522  Clustered = true;
523  }
524  key(Key2; "Type", "No.")
525  {
526  }
527  key(Key3; "Forecast No.", "Linked to Service Item")
528  {
529  }
530  key(Key4; "Forecast No.", "Vendor No.")
531  {
532  }
533  key(TSRDShowInSales; "Forecast No.", "Show in Sales Document") { }
534  }
535 
536  fieldgroups
537  {
538  fieldgroup(DropDown; Type, "No.", Description)
539  { }
540  }
541 
542  trigger OnInsert()
543  begin
544  TestForecastStatusOpen();
545  InitOrderType();
546  InitResponsibilityCenter();
547  Rec."Calculate Separately" := not CalcForecast."Fix Price allowed";
548  end;
549 
550  trigger OnModify()
551  begin
552  TestForecastStatusOpen();
553  end;
554 
555  internal procedure InitType()
556  begin
557  Type := xRec.Type;
558  end;
559 
560  trigger OnDelete()
561  var
562  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
563  begin
564  CalcForecastMgt.DeleteNonStockExtEquipment(Rec);
565  CalcForecastMgt.RemoveAttachedCommentLinesEquipment(Rec);
566  end;
567 
568  internal procedure TestForecastStatusOpen()
569  begin
570  GetCalcForecast();
571  CalcForecast.TestStatusOpen();
572  CalcForecast.TestSalesCalculationStatus();
573  end;
574 
575  local procedure UpdateDiscount()
576  begin
577  if "List Price" <> 0 then
578  "Discount %" := (1 - ("Direct Unit Cost" / "List Price")) * 100
579  else
580  "Discount %" := 0;
581  end;
582 
583  local procedure UpdateDirectUnitCost()
584  begin
585  "Direct Unit Cost" := Round("List Price" - ("List Price" * ("Discount %" / 100)), 0.01);
586  end;
587 
588  local procedure UpdateLineAmounts()
589  var
590  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
591  LineDiscAmt: Decimal;
592  begin
593  "Line Amount (List Price)" := "List Price" * Quantity;
594  "Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)" := "Direct Unit Cost" * Quantity;
595 
596  LineDiscAmt := Round(Quantity * "List Price" * ("Discount %" / 100), 0.01);
597  "Line Amount" := (Quantity * "List Price") - LineDiscAmt;
598  SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
599  "Line Amount" := Round(CalcForecastMgt.GetSalesPriceWithMargin("Line Amount", "Margin %", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model"), 0.01);
600  end;
601 
602  local procedure UpdateMargin()
603  var
604  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
605  begin
606  SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
607  UpdateMarginAmount();
608  "Margin %" := CalcForecastMgt.GetMarginPercentage("Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)", "Line Amount", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model");
609  end;
610 
611  local procedure UpdateMarginAmount()
612  begin
613  "Margin Amount" := "Line Amount" - "Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)";
614  end;
615 
616  local procedure GetCalcForecast()
617  begin
618  CalcForecast.Get("Forecast No.");
619  end;
620 
621  local procedure CheckIsChangingOfVendorNameAllowed()
622  var
623  AlreadyExistErr: Label 'Purchase document already exist for this line, Vendor cannot be changed.';
624  begin
625  if "Purchase Document No." <> '' then
626  Error(AlreadyExistErr);
627  end;
628 
629  internal procedure IsMarginPercentageViable(MarginCalculator: Interface "TSRD MarginCalculator")
630  begin
631  MarginCalculator.IsMarginPercentageViable("Margin %");
632  end;
633 
634  procedure GetCommentLineForm() CommentForm: Text[100]
635  var
636  DescriptionExtension: Text;
637  begin
638  if Quantity <> 0 then begin
639  DescriptionExtension := ' (' + Format(Quantity);
640  if "Unit of Measure" <> '' then
641  DescriptionExtension += ' ' + "Unit of Measure" + ')'
642  else
643  DescriptionExtension += ')';
644  end;
645  CommentForm := CopyStr(Description, 1, MaxStrLen(CommentForm) - StrLen(DescriptionExtension)) + DescriptionExtension;
646  end;
647 
648  procedure GetNextLineNo(): Integer
649  var
650  CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
651  begin
652  CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Forecast No.", Rec."Forecast No.");
653  if CalcExternalEquipment.IsEmpty() then
654  exit(10000);
655  CalcExternalEquipment.FindLast();
656  exit(CalcExternalEquipment."Line No." + 10000);
657  end;
658 
659  internal procedure InitOrderType()
660  var
661  UserSetup: Record "User Setup";
662  begin
663  UserSetup.Get(UserId());
664  if UserSetup."TSR Purchase Order Type" <> '' then
665  Rec.Validate("Purchase Order Type", UserSetup."TSR Purchase Order Type");
666  end;
667 
668  internal procedure InitResponsibilityCenter()
669  var
670  RespCenterSetupMgt: Codeunit "TSR Resp. Center Setup Mgt";
671  RespCenterCode: Code[10];
672  begin
673  RespCenterCode := RespCenterSetupMgt.GetRespCenter("TSR Resp. Center Area"::Purchase, Rec."Vendor No.");
674  if RespCenterCode <> '' then
675  Rec.Validate("Responsibility Center", RespCenterCode);
676  end;
677 
678  internal procedure OpenLinkedPurchaseDocument()
679  var
680  PurchaseInvoiceHeader: Record "Purch. Inv. Header";
681  PurchaseHeader: Record "Purchase Header";
682  begin
683  case "Purchase Document Type" of
684  "Purchase Document Type"::Order:
685  if PurchaseHeader.Get(PurchaseHeader."Document Type"::Order, "Purchase Document No.") then
686  Page.Run(Page::"Purchase Order", PurchaseHeader);
687  "Purchase Document Type"::"Posted Invoice":
688  if PurchaseInvoiceHeader.Get("Purchase Document No.") then
689  Page.Run(Page::"Posted Purchase Invoice", PurchaseInvoiceHeader);
690  end
691  end;
692 
693  local procedure UpdateShowInSalesOnLinkedExtEquipmentLines()
694  var
695  CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
696  begin
697  CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Forecast No.", "Forecast No.");
698  CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Attached to Line No.", "Line No.");
699  if not CalcExternalEquipment.IsEmpty() then
700  CalcExternalEquipment.ModifyAll("Show in Sales Document", "Show in Sales Document");
701  end;
702 
703  var
704  SalesReceivablesSetup: Record "Sales & Receivables Setup";
705  CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
706 }
+48 −0
1 table 5446003 "TSRD Calc. Forecast"
2 {
3  Caption = 'Calculation Worksheet';
4  DataCaptionFields = "No.", Description;
5  DataClassification = CustomerContent;
6  DrillDownPageId = "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
7  LookupPageId = "TSRD Calc. Forecasts";
8 
9  //Always update archive table as well!
10 
11  fields
12  {
13  field(1; "No."; Code[20])
14  {
15  Caption = 'No.';
16  OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
17  }
18  field(2; Description; Text[100])
19  {
20  Caption = 'Description';
21  OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
22  }
23  field(3; "Vendor No."; Code[20])
24  {
25  Caption = 'Vendor No.';
26  OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
27  TableRelation = Vendor."No.";
28 
29  trigger OnValidate()
30  var
31  Vendor: Record Vendor;
32  DataHintMgt: Codeunit "TSR Data Hint Mgt.";
33  begin
34  TestStatusOpen();
35  if "Vendor No." <> '' then begin
36  Vendor.Get("Vendor No.");
37  "Vendor Name" := Vendor.Name;
38  end else
39  "Vendor Name" := '';
40  InitResponsibilityCenter();
41  if (CurrFieldNo = Rec.FieldNo("Vendor No.")) or
42  (CurrFieldNo = Rec.FieldNo("Vendor Name"))
43  then
44  DataHintMgt.DisplayMasterDataHints(Rec, CurrFieldNo);
45  end;
46  }
47  field(4; "Vendor Name"; Text[100])
48  {
49  Caption = 'Vendor Name';
50  OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
51  trigger OnLookup()
52  var
53  Vendor: Record Vendor;
54  begin
55  TestStatusOpen();
56  if Page.RunModal(0, Vendor) = Action::LookupOK then begin
57  if Vendor.Name = '' then
58  Vendor.FieldError(Name);
59  Rec.Validate("Vendor No.", Vendor."No.");
60  end;
61  end;
62 
63  trigger OnValidate()
64  var
65  Vendor: Record Vendor;
66  HelperTools: Codeunit "TSR Helper Tools";
67  LookupVar: Variant;
68  begin
69  TestStatusOpen();
70  if "Vendor Name" <> '' then begin
71  LookupVar := Vendor;
72  if not HelperTools.FindRecordUsingUpToTwoFields(LookupVar, "Vendor Name", Vendor.FieldNo("No."), Vendor.FieldNo(Name)) then
73  Error('');
74  Vendor := LookupVar;
75  if Vendor.Name = '' then
76  Vendor.FieldError(Name);
77  Rec.Validate("Vendor No.", Vendor."No.");
78  end else
79  Rec.Validate("Vendor No.", '');
80  end;
81  }
82  field(5; "Manufacturer Code"; Code[10])
83  {
84  Caption = 'Manufacturer';
85  TableRelation = Manufacturer.Code;
86 
87  trigger OnValidate()
88  var
89  AttributeMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Attribute Mgt.";
90  begin
91  TestStatusOpen();
92  AttributeMgt.ManufacturerValidate(Rec, xRec);
93  CheckAttributesOnConfigurations();
94  UpdateDescription();
95  SetCalculationCurrency();
96  end;
97  }
98  field(6; "Category Code"; Code[20])
99  {
100  Caption = 'Category';
101  TableRelation = "TSRM Service Item Category"."Code";
102  trigger OnValidate()
103  var
104  AttributeMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Attribute Mgt.";
105  begin
106  TestStatusOpen();
107  AttributeMgt.CategoryValidate(Rec, xRec);
108  CheckAttributesOnConfigurations();
109  end;
110  }
111  field(7; "Subcategory Code"; Code[20])
112  {
113  Caption = 'Subcategory';
114  TableRelation = "TSRM Service Item Subcategory"."Code" where("Category Code" = field("Category Code"));
115  trigger OnValidate()
116  var
117  AttributeMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Attribute Mgt.";
118  begin
119  TestStatusOpen();
120  AttributeMgt.SubcategoryValidate(Rec, xRec);
121  CheckAttributesOnConfigurations();
122  end;
123  }
124  field(8; "Model Code"; Code[20])
125  {
126  Caption = 'Model';
127  OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
128  TableRelation = "TSRM Service Item Model"."Code" where("Manufacturer Code" = field("Manufacturer Code"), "Category Code" = field("Category Code"), "Subcategory Code" = field("Subcategory Code"));
129  ValidateTableRelation = false;
130 
131  trigger OnValidate()
132  var
133  AttributeMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Attribute Mgt.";
134  EquipmentMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Equipment Mgt.";
135  begin
136  TestStatusOpen();
137  AttributeMgt.ModelValidate(Rec);
138  CheckAttributesOnConfigurations();
139  UpdateCalcMarginPercentage();
140  UpdateDescription();
141  if CurrFieldNo <> 0 then
142  EquipmentMgt.TransferStandardEquipmentAndModel(Rec, xRec);
143  end;
144  }
145  field(9; "Manufacturer Name"; Text[50])
146  {
147  CalcFormula = lookup(Manufacturer.Name where(Code = field("Manufacturer Code")));
148  Caption = 'Manufacturer Name';
149  Editable = false;
150  FieldClass = FlowField;
151  }
152  field(10; "Category Name"; Text[50])
153  {
154  CalcFormula = lookup("TSRM Service Item Category".Name where(Code = field("Category Code")));
155  Caption = 'Category Name';
156  Editable = false;
157  FieldClass = FlowField;
158  }
159  field(11; "Subcategory Name"; Text[50])
160  {
161  CalcFormula = lookup("TSRM Service Item Subcategory".Name where(Code = field("Subcategory Code"), "Category Code" = field("Category Code")));
162  Caption = 'Subcategory Name';
163  Editable = false;
164  FieldClass = FlowField;
165  }
166  field(12; "Model Name"; Text[100])
167  {
168  CalcFormula = lookup("TSRM Service Item Model".Name where(Code = field("Model Code"), "Manufacturer Code" = field("Manufacturer Code"), "Category Code" = field("Category Code"), "Subcategory Code" = field("Subcategory Code")));
169  Caption = 'Model Name';
170  Editable = false;
171  FieldClass = FlowField;
172  }
173  field(13; "Service Item No."; Code[20])
174  {
175  Caption = 'Service Item No.';
176  OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
177  TableRelation = "Service Item";
178 
179  trigger OnValidate()
180  var
181  DataHintMgt: Codeunit "TSR Data Hint Mgt.";
182  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
183  MachineCommSalesMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Machine Comm. Sales Mgt";
184  OverAllowanceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Over-Allowance Mgt.";
185  begin
186  TestStatusOpen();
187  PrefillVATProdPostingGroup();
188  CalcForecastMgt.ValidateServItemNoOnForecast(Rec, xRec);
189  if CurrFieldNo = Rec.FieldNo("Service Item No.") then
190  DataHintMgt.DisplayMasterDataHints(Rec, CurrFieldNo);
191  MachineCommSalesMgt.ValidateServiceItemNo(Rec);
192  CopyUnitCostOfServiceItem();
193  HandleEquipment();
194  OverAllowanceMgt.SetServiceItemNoOnRetValueAllocs(Rec);
195  end;
196  }

216  UpdateDescription();
217  end;

256  ObsoleteState = Pending;

264  FieldClass = FlowField;
265  }

267  {

271  FieldClass = FlowField;

277  field(28; "Customer No."; Code[20])
278  {
279  Caption = 'Customer No.';
280  OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
281  TableRelation = Customer."No.";
282 
283  trigger OnValidate()
284  var
285  Customer: Record Customer;
286  DataHintMgt: Codeunit "TSR Data Hint Mgt.";
287  begin
288  if Rec."Customer No." = '' then
289  exit;
290  Customer.Get(Rec."Customer No.");
291  Rec."Customer Name" := Customer.Name;
292  if (CurrFieldNo = Rec.FieldNo("Customer No.")) or
293  (CurrFieldNo = Rec.FieldNo("Customer Name"))
294  then
295  DataHintMgt.DisplayMasterDataHints(Rec, CurrFieldNo);
296  end;
297  }
298  field(29; "Customer Name"; Text[100])
299  {
300  Caption = 'Customer Name';
301  OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
302  }
303  field(30; "Contact No."; Code[20])
304  {
305  Caption = 'Contact No.';
306  TableRelation = Contact."No.";
307 
308  trigger OnValidate()
309  var
310  Contact: Record Contact;
311  DataHintMgt: Codeunit "TSR Data Hint Mgt.";
312  begin
313  if Rec."Contact No." = '' then
314  exit;
315  Contact.Get(Rec."Contact No.");
316  Rec."Contact Name" := Contact.Name;
317  if (CurrFieldNo = Rec.FieldNo("Contact No.")) or
318  (CurrFieldNo = Rec.FieldNo("Contact Name"))
319  then
320  DataHintMgt.DisplayMasterDataHints(Rec, CurrFieldNo);
321  end;
322  }
323  field(31; "Contact Name"; Text[100])
324  {
325  Caption = 'Contact Name';
326  OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
327  }
328  field(32; "List Price Conf. Options"; Decimal)
329  {
330  CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Configuration"."Line Amount (List Price)" where("Forecast No." = field("No.")));
331  Caption = 'List Price Configuration Options';
332  Editable = false;
333  FieldClass = FlowField;
334  }
335  field(33; "Configuration Price"; Decimal)
336  {
337  CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Configuration"."Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)" where("Forecast No." = field("No.")));
338  Caption = 'Configuration Price';
339  Editable = false;
340  FieldClass = FlowField;
341  }
342  field(34; "Total Discount"; Decimal)
343  {
344  CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Purchase Discounts"."Discount Amount" where("Forecast No." = field("No.")));
345  Caption = 'Total Purchase Discount';
346  Editable = false;
347  FieldClass = FlowField;
348  }
349  field(35; "Workshop Amount Labour"; Decimal)
350  {
351  CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Workshop"."Amount (Labor)" where("Forecast No." = field("No.")));
352  Caption = 'Services Amount Labor';
353  Editable = false;
354  FieldClass = FlowField;
355  }
356  field(36; "Workshop Amount Parts"; Decimal)
357  {
358  CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Workshop"."Amount (Parts)" where("Forecast No." = field("No.")));
359  Caption = 'Services Amount Parts';
360  Editable = false;
361  FieldClass = FlowField;
362  }
363  field(37; "Workshop Amount"; Decimal)
364  {
365  CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Workshop"."Total Amount" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Calculate Separately" = const(false)));
366  Caption = 'Services Amount';
367  Editable = false;
368  FieldClass = FlowField;
369  }
370  field(38; "Total Costs"; Decimal)
371  {
372  CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Cost".Amount where("Forecast No." = field("No.")));
373  Caption = 'Total Costs';
374  Editable = false;
375  FieldClass = FlowField;
376  }
377  field(39; "Equipment List Price"; Decimal)
378  {
379  CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. External Equipment"."Line Amount (List Price)" where("Forecast No." = field("No.")));
380  Caption = 'Additional Configuration List Price';
381  Editable = false;
382  FieldClass = FlowField;
383  }
384  field(40; "Equipment Cost"; Decimal)
385  {
386  CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. External Equipment"."Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)" where("Forecast No." = field("No.")));
387  Caption = 'Additional Configuration Cost';
388  Editable = false;
389  FieldClass = FlowField;
390  }
391  field(41; "Equipment Price"; Decimal)
392  {
393  CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. External Equipment"."Line Amount" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Calculate Separately" = const(false)));
394  Caption = 'Additional Configuration Price';
395  Editable = false;
396  FieldClass = FlowField;
397  }
398  field(42; "Equipment (Separate)"; Decimal)
399  {
400  CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. External Equipment"."Line Amount" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Calculate Separately" = const(true)));
401  Caption = 'Additional Configuration (Separate)';
402  Editable = false;
403  FieldClass = FlowField;
404  }
405  field(43; "Calc. Sales For. Version No."; Integer)
406  {
407  Caption = 'Configure Price Quote Version No.';
408  ObsoleteReason = 'New field: Version No.';
409  ObsoleteState = Pending;
410  ObsoleteTag = '2102.230700.0.0';
411  TableRelation = "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast Line"."Version No." where("Forecast No." = field("No."));
412  }
413  field(44; "Total Sales Discount"; Decimal)
414  {
415  CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Sales Discounts"."Discount Amount" where("Forecast No." = field("No.")));
416  Caption = 'Total Sales Discount';
417  Editable = false;
418  FieldClass = FlowField;
419  }
420  field(45; "Base Machine List Price"; Decimal)
421  {
422  Caption = 'Base Machine List Price';
423  MinValue = 0;
424 
425  trigger OnValidate()
426  var
427  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
428  OverAllowanceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Over-Allowance Mgt.";
429  begin
430  TestStatusOpen();
431  UpdateListPrice();
432  UpdateCalcSalesPrice();
433  CalcForecastMgt.RecalculatePurchDiscountsOnDealerNetPriceChange(Rec);
434  CalcForecastMgt.RecalculateSalesDiscountsOnSalesPriceChange(Rec);
435  if "Show calculated Sales Prices" then
436  UpdateConfigCalculatedSalesPrices();
437  UpdateMarginAndSalesPrice();
438  UpdateSalesPriceSCC();
439  if Rec."Base Machine List Price" <> xRec."Base Machine List Price" then
440  OverAllowanceMgt.RecreateOverAllowances(Rec);
441  end;
442  }
443  field(50; Template; Boolean)
444  {
445  Caption = 'Template';
446  Editable = false;
447  }
448  field(60; "Purchase Document No."; Code[20])
449  {
450  Caption = 'Purchase Document No.';
451  Editable = false;
452  OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
453  }
454  field(61; "Purchase Document Type"; Enum "TSRD Calc. Purch. Doc. Type")
455  {
456  Caption = 'Purchase Document Type';
457  Editable = false;
458  }
459  field(62; "Service Item Created"; Boolean)
460  {
461  Caption = 'Service Item Created';
462  Editable = false;
463  }
464  field(70; "Location Code"; Code[10])
465  {
466  Caption = 'Location Code';
467  TableRelation = Location;
468  }
469  field(80; "Calculated Margin %"; Decimal)
470  {
471  AutoFormatExpression = '<precision, 1:2><standard format,0>';
472  AutoFormatType = 10;
473  Caption = 'Calculated Margin %';
474  CaptionClass = SalesReceivablesSetup.GetMarginCaption(CalculatedMarginLbl, ' %');
475  Editable = false;
476  MinValue = 0.0001;
477 
478  trigger OnValidate()
479  begin
480  TestStatusOpen();
481  UpdateCalcSalesPrice();
482  end;
483  }
484  field(81; "Calculated Sales Price"; Decimal)
485  {
486  Caption = 'Calculated Sales Price';
487  Editable = false;
488 
489  trigger OnValidate()
490  begin
491  if ((xRec."Calculated Sales Price" = "Sales Price") and ("Calculated Sales Price" <> "Sales Price"))
492  or ("Sales Price" < "Calculated Sales Price") and (Status <> Status::Released)
493  then begin
494  Rec.Validate("Sales Price", "Calculated Sales Price");
495  exit;
496  end;
497  UpdateCalcMarginPercentage();
498  UpdateCalcSalesPriceSCC();
499  end;
500  }
501  field(82; "Margin %"; Decimal)
502  {
503  AutoFormatExpression = '<precision, 1:2><standard format,0>';
504  AutoFormatType = 10;
505  Caption = 'Margin %';
506  CaptionClass = SalesReceivablesSetup.GetMarginCaption('', ' %');
507  MinValue = 0;
508 
509  trigger OnValidate()
510  var
511  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
512  begin
513  CheckAndFixMinimumMargin();
514  if not "Includes Sales Discount" then begin
515  SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
516  "Sales Price" := CalcForecastMgt.GetSalesPriceWithMargin(GetCalculatedUnitCost(), "Margin %", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model");
517  UpdateSalesPriceSCC();
518  "Margin Amount" := "Sales Price" - GetCalculatedUnitCost();
519  end;
520  UpdateConfigCalculatedSalesPrices();
521  end;
522  }
523  field(83; "Sales Price"; Decimal)
524  {
525  Caption = 'Sales Price';
526  MinValue = 0;
527 
528  trigger OnValidate()
529  var
530  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
531  begin
532  if CurrFieldNo <> 0 then
533  TestStatusOpen();
534  if "Sales Price" = 0 then
535  "Sales Price" := "Calculated Sales Price";
536  if "Calculated Sales Price" = 0 then
537  exit;
538  if not "Includes Sales Discount" then begin
539  SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
540  "Margin Amount" := "Sales Price" - GetCalculatedUnitCost();
541  "Margin %" := CalcForecastMgt.GetMarginPercentageFromSalesPrice(SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model", GetCalculatedUnitCost(), "Sales Price");
542  end;
543  UpdateConfigCalculatedSalesPrices();
544  if CurrFieldNo = FieldNo("Sales Price") then
545  UpdateSalesPriceSCC();
546  end;
547  }
548  field(84; "Margin Amount"; Decimal)
549  {
550  Caption = 'Margin Amount';
551  CaptionClass = GetCaptionWithCurrencyCode(SalesReceivablesSetup.GetMarginCaption(), Rec."Calculation Currency");
552  trigger OnValidate()
553  var
554  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
555  begin
556  TestStatusOpen();
557  if not "Includes Sales Discount" then begin
558  SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
559  "Sales Price" := GetCalculatedUnitCost() + "Margin Amount";
560  "Margin %" := CalcForecastMgt.GetMarginPercentageFromSalesPrice(SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model", GetCalculatedUnitCost(), "Sales Price");
561  FixAccordingtoMinimumMargin();
562  end;
563  UpdateConfigCalculatedSalesPrices();
564  end;
565  }
566  field(90; "Workshop (Separate)"; Decimal)
567  {
568  CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Workshop"."Total Amount" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Calculate Separately" = const(true)));
569  Caption = 'Services (Separate)';
570  Editable = false;
571  FieldClass = FlowField;
572  }
573  field(95; "Conf Price with Calc. Discount"; Decimal)
574  {
575  CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Configuration"."Line Amount (List Price)" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Calculate Discount" = const(true)));
576  Caption = 'Configuration Price with Calc. Discount';
577  Editable = false;
578  FieldClass = FlowField;
579  ObsoleteReason = 'Not needed anymore. Field Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost) is used instead.';
580  ObsoleteState = Pending;
581  ObsoleteTag = '2302.2411';
582  }
583  field(96; "Dir unit cost with Calc. Disc"; Decimal)
584  {
585  CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Configuration"."Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Calculate Discount" = const(true)));
586  Caption = 'Direct unit cost Price with Calc. Discount';
587  Editable = false;
588  FieldClass = FlowField;
589  }
590  field(100; "Return Type"; Enum "TSRD Calc. Forecast Ret Type")
591  {
592  Caption = 'Return Type';
593  trigger OnValidate()
594  var
595  AgencyBusinessMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Agency Business Mgt.";
596  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
597  ReturnTypeErr: Label 'Fix Price is allowed for this Calculation Worksheet. You can''t change the Return Type.';
598  begin
599  if Rec."Return Type" = xRec."Return Type" then
600  exit;
601  CheckIsReturnTypeEditable();
602  if Rec."Fix Price allowed" then
603  Error(ReturnTypeErr);
604  if "Return Type" = "Return Type"::"Agency Business" then
605  AgencyBusinessMgt.CheckUserSetupActivated();
606  CalcForecastMgt.CheckAndDeleteRelatedData(Rec);
607  end;
608  }
609  field(101; "Line No."; Integer)
610  {
611  Caption = 'Line No.';
612  Editable = false;
613  }
614  field(102; "Created from Template"; Boolean)
615  {
616  CalcFormula = exist("TSRD Calc. Forecast" where("No." = field("Template Forecast No."), Template = const(true)));
617  Caption = 'Created from Template';
618  Editable = false;
619  FieldClass = FlowField;
620  }

622  {
623  Caption = 'Quantity';
624  Editable = false;
625  InitValue = 1;
626  MinValue = 1;
627  }

636  Editable = false;

640  Caption = 'Version No.';
641  Editable = false;

643  field(107; "System-Created"; Boolean)
644  {
645  Caption = 'System-Created';
646  DataClassification = SystemMetadata;
647  Editable = false;
648  }
649  field(108; "Service Item Status(Purchase)"; Enum "TSRM Status(Purchase)")
650  {
651  CalcFormula = lookup("Service Item"."TSRM Status(Purchase)" where("No." = field("Service Item No.")));
652  Caption = 'Status (Purchase)';
653  Editable = false;
654  FieldClass = FlowField;
655  }
656  field(109; "Service Item Status (Sales)"; Enum "TSRM Status(Sales)")
657  {
658  CalcFormula = lookup("Service Item"."TSRM Status(Sales)" where("No." = field("Service Item No.")));
659  Caption = 'Status (Sales)';

661  FieldClass = FlowField;
662  }
663  field(110; "Sales Calculation Status"; Enum "TSRD Sales Calculation Status")
664  {
665  Caption = 'Configure Price Quote Status';
666  Editable = false;

668  ObsoleteState = Pending;
669  ObsoleteTag = '2502.251100';
670  }
671  field(111; "Standard Equipment"; Boolean)
672  {
673  CalcFormula = exist("TSRD Standard Equipment" where("Forecast No." = field("No.")));
674  Caption = 'Standard Configuration';
675  Editable = false;
