677  }
678  field(115; "Discounted Machine Sales Price"; Decimal)
679  {
680  Caption = 'Discounted Machine Sales Price';
681  Editable = false;
682  ObsoleteReason = 'Field was missnamed in conception. Actual field is "Calculated Machine Sales Price"';
683  ObsoleteState = Pending;
684  ObsoleteTag = '2402';
685  }
686  field(120; "Show discounted Sales Prices"; Boolean)
687  {
688  Caption = 'Show discounted Sales Prices';
689  Editable = false;
690  ObsoleteReason = 'Field was missnamed in conception. Actual field is "Show Calculated Sales Prices"';
691  ObsoleteState = Pending;
692  ObsoleteTag = '2402';
693  }
694  field(121; "Show List Prices"; Boolean)
695  {
696  Caption = 'Show List Prices';
697 
698  trigger OnValidate()
699  begin
700  if "Show List Prices" then
701  TestField("Show calculated Sales Prices", false);
702  UpdateListPrice();
703  UpdateMarginAndSalesPrice()
704  end;
705  }
706  field(122; "Calc. Sales Price (Fix Price)"; Decimal)
707  {
708  Caption = 'Calc. Sales Price (Fix Price)';
709  Editable = false;
710 
711  trigger OnValidate()
712  var
713  MarginSetup: Record "TSRD Margin Setup";
714  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
715  MinimumMargin: Decimal;
716  MarginTooLowErr: Label 'The calculated Fix Price for %1 must not be below the minimum margin.', Comment = '%1 = Calculation Worksheet No.';
717  begin
718  "Surchage Amount (Fix Price)" := "Calc. Sales Price (Fix Price)" - CalcForecastMgt.ExchangeAmtFCYtoFCY("Calc Currency Exchange Rate", "Sales Currency Exchange Rate", GetCalculatedUnitCost());
719  "Surcharge % (Fix Price)" := ("Calc. Sales Price (Fix Price)" / ("Calc. Sales Price (Fix Price)" - "Surchage Amount (Fix Price)") - 1) * 100;
720  MinimumMargin := MarginSetup.GetMinimumMarginPercentage(Rec."Manufacturer Code", Rec."Category Code",
721  Rec."Subcategory Code", Rec."Series Code", Rec."Model Code");
722 
723  if "Surcharge % (Fix Price)" < MinimumMargin then
724  Error(MarginTooLowErr, Rec."No.");
725  end;
726  }
727  field(123; "Surchage Amount (Fix Price)"; Decimal)
728  {
729  Caption = 'Surcharge Amount (Fix Price)';
730  Editable = false;
731  }
732  field(124; "Surcharge % (Fix Price)"; Decimal)
733  {
734  AutoFormatExpression = '<precision, 1:2><standard format,0>';
735  AutoFormatType = 10;
736  Caption = 'Surcharge % (Fix Price)';
737  Editable = false;
738  }
739  field(125; "Purchase Order Type"; Code[10])
740  {
741  Caption = 'Purchase Order Type';
742  TableRelation = "Service Order Type".Code where("TSR Purchase" = const(true));
743  }
744  field(126; "Responsibility Center"; Code[10])
745  {
746  Caption = 'Responsibility Center';
747  TableRelation = "Responsibility Center".Code;
748 
749  trigger OnLookup()
750  var
751  RespCenterSetupMgt: Codeunit "TSR Resp. Center Setup Mgt";
752  RespCenterCode: Code[10];
753  begin
754  RespCenterCode := RespCenterSetupMgt.LookUpRespCenter("TSR Resp. Center Area"::Purchase);
755  if RespCenterCode <> '' then
756  Rec.Validate("Responsibility Center", RespCenterCode);
757  end;
758 
759  trigger OnValidate()
760  var
761  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
762  RespCenterSetupMgt: Codeunit "TSR Resp. Center Setup Mgt";
763  begin
764  RespCenterSetupMgt.CheckRespCenter(Rec."Responsibility Center", "TSR Resp. Center Area"::Purchase);
765  CalcForecastMgt.SetLocationFromResponsibilityCenter(Rec."Location Code", Rec."Responsibility Center");
766  end;
767  }
768  field(127; "Fix Price allowed"; Boolean)
769  {
770  Caption = 'Fix Price allowed';
771 
772  trigger OnValidate()
773  var
774  CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
775  FixPriceAlreadyCalculatedErr: Label 'Fix Price has already been calculated. Please remove the Fix Price first';
776  ReturnTypeErr: Label 'You can''t set Fix Price Allowed if Return Type is set.';
777  begin
778  if not Rec."Fix Price allowed" then begin
779  Rec."Calc. Sales Price (Fix Price)" := 0;
780  Rec."Surchage Amount (Fix Price)" := 0;
781  Rec."Surcharge % (Fix Price)" := 0;
782  end else begin
783  if Rec."Return Type" <> Rec."Return Type"::" " then
784  Error(ReturnTypeErr);
785  CalcSalesForecast.Get("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", "Version No.");
786  if CalcSalesForecast."Fix Price Calculated" then
787  Error(FixPriceAlreadyCalculatedErr);
788  TestSalesDiscountsEmpty(FieldCaption("Fix Price allowed"));
789  CheckCalcWorkShopForSeparate();
790  CheckCalcExternalEquipmentForSeparate();
791  end;
792  end;
793  }
794  field(128; "Calculated Machine Sales Price"; Decimal)
795  {
796  Caption = 'Calculated Machine Sales Price';
797  Editable = false;
798  }
799  field(129; "Show calculated Sales Prices"; Boolean)
800  {
801  Caption = 'Show calculated Sales Prices';
802 
803  trigger OnValidate()
804  begin
805  if "Show calculated Sales Prices" then begin
806  TestField("Show List Prices", false);
807  TestSalesDiscountsEmpty(FieldCaption("Show calculated Sales Prices"));
808  UpdateConfigCalculatedSalesPrices();
809  end else
810  EmptyCalculatedSalesPriceFields();
811  end;
812  }
813  field(130; "Includes Sales Discount"; Boolean)
814  {
815  Caption = 'Includes Sales Discount';
816  Editable = false;
817 
818  trigger OnValidate()
819  begin
820  if "Includes Sales Discount" then
821  if "Margin %" <> "Calculated Margin %" then
822  Validate("Margin %", "Calculated Margin %");
823  end;
824  }
825  field(131; "FA Calc. SalPrice (Fix Price)"; Decimal)
826  {
827  Caption = 'Fixed Asset Calc. Sales Price (Fix Price)';
828  Editable = false;
829 
830  trigger OnValidate()
831  var
832  MarginSetup: Record "TSRD Margin Setup";
833  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
834  MinimumMargin: Decimal;
835  MarginTooLowErr: Label 'The calculated Fix Price for %1 must not be below the minimum margin.', Comment = '%1 = Calculation Worksheet No.';
836  begin
837  if Rec."Service Item In Stock As" <> Rec."Service Item In Stock As"::"Fixed Asset" then
838  exit;
839  "Surchage Amount (Fix Price)" := "FA Calc. SalPrice (Fix Price)" - CalcForecastMgt.ExchangeAmtFCYtoFCY("Calc Currency Exchange Rate", "Sales Currency Exchange Rate", GetCalculatedUnitCost());
840  "Surcharge % (Fix Price)" := ("FA Calc. SalPrice (Fix Price)" / ("FA Calc. SalPrice (Fix Price)" - "Surchage Amount (Fix Price)") - 1) * 100;
841  MinimumMargin := MarginSetup.GetMinimumMarginPercentage(Rec."Manufacturer Code", Rec."Category Code",
842  Rec."Subcategory Code", Rec."Series Code", Rec."Model Code");
843 
844  if "Surcharge % (Fix Price)" < MinimumMargin then
845  Error(MarginTooLowErr, Rec."No.");
846  end;
847  }
848  field(132; "VAT Prod. Posting Group"; Code[20])
849  {
850  Caption = 'VAT Prod. Posting Group';
851  TableRelation = "VAT Product Posting Group";
852 
853  trigger OnValidate()
854  var
855  CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
856  VATPostingSetup: Record "VAT Posting Setup";
857  begin
858  if "Calc. Sales Forecast No." = '' then
859  exit;
860  CalcSalesForecast.Get("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", "Version No.");
861  VATPostingSetup.Get(CalcSalesForecast."VAT Bus. Posting Group", "VAT Prod. Posting Group");
862  UpdateVATPercentage(VATPostingSetup);
863  end;
864  }
865  field(135; "Sales Price incl. VAT"; Decimal)
866  {
867  Caption = 'Sales Price incl. VAT';
868 
869  trigger OnValidate()
870  begin
871  Validate("Sales Price", "Sales Price incl. VAT" * (100 / (100 + "VAT %")));
872  end;
873  }
874  field(140; "VAT %"; Decimal)
875  {
876  Caption = 'VAT %';
877  Editable = false;
878  }
879  field(145; "VAT Amount"; Decimal)
880  {
881  Caption = 'VAT Amount';
882  Editable = false;
883  }
884  field(150; "Service Item In Stock As"; Enum "TSRM In Stock As")
885  {
886  Caption = 'Service Item In Stock As';
887  Editable = false;
888  }
889  field(151; "Calculated Price (Fix Price)"; Decimal)
890  {
891  Caption = 'Calculated Price (Fix Price)';
892  Editable = false;
893  }
894  field(152; "Configuration Sales Price"; Decimal)
895  {
896  CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Configuration"."Calculated Sales Price" where("Forecast No." = field("No.")));
897  Caption = 'Configuration Price';
898  Editable = false;
899  FieldClass = FlowField;
900  }
901  field(160; "Calculation Currency"; Code[10])
902  {
903  Caption = 'Calculation Currency';
904  TableRelation = Currency;
905  trigger OnValidate()
906  var
907  GeneralLedgerSetup: Record "General Ledger Setup";
908  begin
909  GeneralLedgerSetup.Get();
910  if ("Calculation Currency" = "Sales Currency") and
911  ("Calculation Currency" <> '') and
912  ("Calculation Currency" = GeneralLedgerSetup."LCY Code") then
913  Error(SameSalesAndCalcCurrencyErr);
914  PrefillCalcExchangeRate();
915  UpdateAllPricesWithMultiplier();
916  end;
917  }
918  field(165; "Calc Currency Exchange Rate"; Decimal)
919  {
920  Caption = 'Calculation Currency Exchange Rate';
921  DecimalPlaces = 4;
922  InitValue = 1;
923  trigger OnValidate()
924  var
925  CalcCurrExchangeRateErr: Label 'Exchange Rate cannot be 0';
926  CalculationCurrNotDefinedErr: Label 'Calculation Currency is not defined';
927  begin
928  if ("Calculation Currency" = '') and (CurrFieldNo = (FieldNo("Calc Currency Exchange Rate"))) then
929  Error(CalculationCurrNotDefinedErr);
930  if "Calc Currency Exchange Rate" = 0 then
931  Error(CalcCurrExchangeRateErr);
932  end;
933  }
934  field(170; "Calculated Sales Price (SCC)"; Decimal)
935  {
936  Caption = 'Calculated Sales Price';
937  Editable = false;
938  }
939  field(175; "Sales Price (SCC)"; Decimal)
940  {
941  Caption = 'Sales Price';
942  MinValue = 0;
943 
944  trigger OnValidate()
945  begin
946  if CurrFieldNo = FieldNo("Sales Price (SCC)") then
947  UpdateSalesPriceFromSCC();
948  end;
949  }
950  field(180; "Sales Currency Exchange Rate"; Decimal)
951  {
952  Caption = 'Sales Currency Exchange Rate';
953  DecimalPlaces = 4;
954  Editable = false;
955  InitValue = 1;
956  }
957  field(185; "Sales Currency"; Code[10])
958  {
959  Caption = 'Sales Currency';
960  Editable = false;
961  TableRelation = Currency;
962  }
963  field(190; "Service Item Calculation"; Boolean)
964  {
965  Caption = 'Service Item Calculation Worksheet';
966  Editable = false;
967  }
968  field(200; "Over-Allowance Cost"; Decimal)
969  {
970  CalcFormula =
971  sum(
972  "TSRD Return Value Allocation"."Over-Allowance Allocation"
973  where(
974  "Sales Calculation No." = field("Calc. Sales Forecast No."),
975  "Source Forecast No." = field("No.")
976  )
977  );
978  Caption = 'Over-Allowance Cost';
979  Editable = false;
980  FieldClass = FlowField;
981  }
982  field(201; "Over-Allowance Price"; Decimal)
983  {
984  CalcFormula =
985  sum(
986  "TSRD Return Value Allocation"."Return Price Allocation"
987  where(
988  "Sales Calculation No." = field("Calc. Sales Forecast No."),
989  "Source Forecast No." = field("No.")
990  )
991  );
992  Caption = 'Over-Allowance Price';
993  Editable = false;
994  FieldClass = FlowField;
995  }
996  field(202; "Over-Allowance Lines Exist"; Boolean)
997  {
998  CalcFormula =
999  exist(
1000  "TSRD Calc. Trade-In/Purch"
1001  where(
1002  "Forecast No." = field("No."),
1003  "Over-Allowance Value" = filter(<> 0),
1004  "Over-Allowance Posted" = const(false)
1005  )
1006  );
1007  Caption = 'Over-Allowance Lines Exist';
1008  Editable = false;
1009  FieldClass = FlowField;
1010  }
1011  field(983; "Service Activities"; Enum "TSRD CPQ Related Activities")
1012  {
1013  Caption = 'Service Activities';
1014  Editable = false;
1015  }
1016  field(984; "Return Status"; Enum "TSRD CPQ Related Activities")
1017  {
1018  Caption = 'Return Status';
1019  Editable = false;
1020  }
·-
1021+ field(5446150; "Additional Config. (Sep.) SP"; Decimal)
1022+ {
1023+ CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. External Equipment"."Line Amount" where("Forecast No." = field("No."),
1024+ "Charging Method" = const("Calc. Separately")));
1025+ Caption = 'Additional Configuration (Separate)';
1026+ Editable = false;
1027+ FieldClass = FlowField;
1028+ }
1029+ field(5446151; "Additional Config. (Sep.) Cost"; Decimal)
1030+ {
1031+ CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. External Equipment"."Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)" where("Forecast No." = field("No."),
1032+ "Charging Method" = const("Calc. Separately")));
1033+ Caption = 'Additional Configuration Price (Separate)';
1034+ Editable = false;
1035+ FieldClass = FlowField;
1036+ }
1037+ field(5446152; "Services (Separate) SP"; Decimal)
1038+ {
1039+ CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Workshop"."Sales Price" where("Forecast No." = field("No."),
1040+ "Charging Method" = const("Calc. Separately")));
1041+ Caption = 'Services (Separate)';
1042+ Editable = false;
1043+ FieldClass = FlowField;
1044+ }
1045+ field(5446153; "Services (Separate) Amount"; Decimal)
1046+ {
1047+ CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Workshop"."Total Amount" where("Forecast No." = field("No."),
1048+ "Charging Method" = const("Calc. Separately")));
1049+ Caption = 'Service Amount (Separate)';
1050+ Editable = false;
1051+ FieldClass = FlowField;
1052+ }
1053+ field(5446154; "Costs (Separate) SP"; Decimal)
1054+ {
1055+ CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Cost"."Sales Price" where("Forecast No." = field("No."),
1056+ "Charging Method" = const("Calc. Separately")));
1057+ Caption = 'Costs (Separate)';
1058+ Editable = false;
1059+ FieldClass = FlowField;
1060+ }
1061+ field(5446155; "Costs (Separate) Amount"; Decimal)
1062+ {
1063+ CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Cost".Amount where("Forecast No." = field("No."),
1064+ "Charging Method" = const("Calc. Separately")));
1065+ Caption = 'Total Costs (Separate)';
1066+ Editable = false;
1067+ FieldClass = FlowField;
1068+ }
1069  }
1070  keys
1071  {
1072  key(PK; "No.")
1073  {
1074  Clustered = true;
1075  }
1076  key(ServiceItemNoKey; "Service Item No.")
1077  {
1078  }
1079  key(SortKey; "Sort No.", "Version No.", "Calc. Sales Forecast No.")
1080  {
1081  }
1082  key(SalesPriceKey; "Calc. Sales Forecast No.")
1083  {
1084  MaintainSiftIndex = true;
1085  SumIndexFields = "Sales Price";
1086  }
1087  key(TemplateKey; Template, "System-Created", "Purchase Document Type", "Purchase Document No.", "Base Code")
1088  {
1089  }
1090  key(StatusKey; Status)
1091  {
1092  }
1093  }
1094  trigger OnInsert()
1095  var
1096  begin
1097  if "No." = '' then
1098  GenerateNoSeries(true);
1099  "Creation Date" := Today();
1100  "Creation by User" := CopyStr(UserId(), 1, 50);
1101  InitOrderType();
1102  InitResponsibilityCenter();
1103  TestMandatoryFields();
1104  UpdateDescription();
1105  CheckServItemCalculation();
1106  end;
1107 
1108  trigger OnModify()
1109  var
1110  begin
1111  TestStatusOpen();
1112  "Last Date Modified" := Today();
1113  "Last Modified by User" := CopyStr(UserId(), 1, 50);
1114  TestMandatoryFields();
1115  end;
1116 
1117  trigger OnRename()
1118  begin
1119  "Last Date Modified" := Today();
1120  "Last Modified by User" := CopyStr(UserId(), 1, 50);
1121  TestMandatoryFields();
1122  end;
1123 
1124  trigger OnDelete()
1125  var
1126  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
1127  begin
1128  TestStatusOpen();
1129  TestSystemCreatedFalse();
1130  TestSalesCalculationStatus();
1131  if not SkipUpdatePurchaseHeader then
1132  CalcForecastMgt.ClearForecastNoInPurchaseOrder(Rec."No.");
1133  CalcForecastMgt.RenumberSortNos(Rec);
1134  end;
1135 
1136  procedure GenerateNoSeries(FromTemplate: Boolean)
1137  begin
1138  SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
1139  case FromTemplate of
1140  true:
1141  begin
1142  SalesReceivablesSetup.TestField(SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Template Forecast Nos.");
1143  "No." := NoSeries.GetNextNo(SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Template Forecast Nos.");
1144  Template := true;
1145  end;
1146  false:
1147  begin
1148  SalesReceivablesSetup.TestField(SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Forecast Nos.");
1149  "No." := NoSeries.GetNextNo(SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Forecast Nos.");
1150  end;
1151  end
1152  end;
1153 
1154  procedure GetNextLineNo(): Integer
1155  var
1156  CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
1157  begin
1158  CalcForecast.SetCurrentKey("Line No.");
1159  CalcForecast.SetRange("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", "Calc. Sales Forecast No.");
1160  CalcForecast.SetRange("Version No.", "Version No.");
1161  if CalcForecast.IsEmpty() then
1162  exit(10000);
1163  CalcForecast.FindLast();
1164  exit(CalcForecast."Line No." + 10000);
1165  end;
1166 
1167  procedure GetNextSortNo(): Integer
1168  var
1169  CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
1170  begin
1171  CalcForecast.SetCurrentKey("Sort No.");
1172  CalcForecast.SetRange("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", "Calc. Sales Forecast No.");
1173  CalcForecast.SetRange("Version No.", "Version No.");
1174  if CalcForecast.IsEmpty() then
1175  exit(1);
1176  CalcForecast.FindLast();
1177  exit(CalcForecast."Sort No." + 1);
1178  end;
1179 
1180  procedure SetSkipCheckSystemCreated(NewSkipCheckSystemCreated: Boolean)
1181  begin
1182  SkipCheckSystemCreated := NewSkipCheckSystemCreated;
1183  end;
1184 
1185  internal procedure GetBaseMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc() BaseMachineListPriceSales: Decimal
1186  var
1187  Handled: Boolean;
1188  begin
1189  OnBeforeGetBaseMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalculation(Rec, Handled, BaseMachineListPriceSales);
1190  if Handled then
1191  exit;
1192  exit(Rec."Base Machine List Price");
1193  end;
1194 
1195  internal procedure GetMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc() ListPriceSales: Decimal
1196  var
1197  Handled: Boolean;
1198  begin
1199  OnBeforeGetMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalculation(Rec, Handled, ListPriceSales);
1200  if Handled then
1201  exit;
1202  exit(Rec."List Price");
1203  end;
1204 
1205  internal procedure UpdateDescription()
1206  var
1207  StringMgt: Codeunit "TSR String Mgt.";
1208  ReturnList: List of [Text];
1209  Descr: Text;
1210  xDescr: Text;
1211  begin
1212  CalcFields("Manufacturer Name", "Subcategory Name", "Series Name", "Model Name");
1213  Descr := "Manufacturer Name" + ' ' + "Subcategory Name" + ' ' + "Series Name" + ' ' + "Model Name";
1214  xDescr := xRec."Manufacturer Name" + ' ' + xRec."Subcategory Name" + ' ' + xRec."Series Name" + ' ' + xRec."Model Name";
1215  Descr := Descr.Trim().Replace(' ', ' ');
1216  xDescr := xDescr.Trim().Replace(' ', ' ');
1217  if Description <> '' then
1218  if Description <> xDescr then
1219  exit;
1220  if StringMgt.SplitStringSpecificLen(Descr, MaxStrLen(Description), ' ', ReturnList) then
1221  Validate(Description, ReturnList.Get(1));
1222  end;
1223 
1224  internal procedure GetDate(): Date
1225  var
1226  CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
1227  begin
1228  if CalcSalesForecast.Get("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", "Version No.") and (CalcSalesForecast.Date <> 0D) then
1229  exit(CalcSalesForecast.Date);
1230  exit(WorkDate());
1231  end;
1232 
1233  internal procedure GetStatusStyleText() StatusStyleText: Text
1234  begin
1235  case Status of
1236  Status::Open:
1237  StatusStyleText := 'Favorable';
1238  Status::Alternative:
1239  StatusStyleText := 'StrongAccent'
1240  else
1241  StatusStyleText := 'Strong';
1242  end;
1243 
1244  OnAfterGetStatusStyleText(Rec, StatusStyleText);
1245  end;
1246 
1247  procedure SetSkipUpdatePurchaseHeader(NewSkipUpdatePurchaseHeader: Boolean)
1248  begin
1249  SkipUpdatePurchaseHeader := NewSkipUpdatePurchaseHeader;
1250  end;
1251 
1252  procedure TestStatusOpen()
1253  begin
1254  if DoNotTestStatusOpen or StatusCheckSuspended then
1255  exit;
1256  if not (Rec.Status in [Status::Open, Status::Alternative]) then
1257  Rec.FieldError(Status);
1258  end;
1259 
1260  internal procedure TestSalesCalculationStatus()
1261  var
1262  StatusWonOrLostErr: Label 'Configure Price Quote status is either won or lost. You can''t change the Calculation Worksheet.';
1263  begin
1264  if Rec.GetStatusCheckSuspended() then
1265  exit;
1266  if Rec.GetSalesCalculationStatus() in ["TSRD Sales Calculation Status"::Won, "TSRD Sales Calculation Status"::Lost] then
1267  Error(StatusWonOrLostErr);
1268  end;
1269 
1270  procedure GetCalculatedUnitCost() CalculatedUnitCost: Decimal
1271  begin
1272  CalcFields("Total Costs", "Total Discount", "Equipment Price", "Workshop Amount", "Configuration Price", "List Price Conf. Options", "Over-Allowance Cost");
1273  case true of
1274  "Show calculated Sales Prices":
1275  CalculatedUnitCost := Rec."Configuration Price"
1276  + "Base Machine List Price"
1277  + "Equipment Price"
1278  + "Total Costs"
1279  + "Workshop Amount"
1280  - "Total Discount";
1281  "Show List Prices":
1282  CalculatedUnitCost := Rec."List Price Conf. Options"
1283  + "Base Machine List Price"
1284  + "Equipment Price"
1285  + "Total Costs"
1286  + "Workshop Amount"
1287  - "Total Discount";
1288  else
1289  CalculatedUnitCost := Rec."List Price"
1290  + "Equipment Price"
1291  + "Total Costs"
1292  + "Workshop Amount"
1293  - "Total Discount";
1294  end;
1295 
1296  if "Over-Allowance Cost" > 0 then
1297  CalculatedUnitCost += "Over-Allowance Cost";
1298  end;
1299 
1300  internal procedure GetCalculatedUnitPrice() CalculatedUnitPrice: Decimal
1301  begin
1302  CalcFields("Total Costs", "Total Sales Discount", "Equipment Price", "Workshop Amount");
1303  CalculatedUnitPrice := Rec.GetMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc()
1304  + "Equipment Price"
1305  + "Total Costs"
1306  + "Workshop Amount"
1307  - "Total Sales Discount";
1308  end;
1309 
1310  local procedure CheckAndFixMinimumMargin()
1311  var
1312  MarginSetup: Record "TSRD Margin Setup";
1313  NotificationManagement: Codeunit "TSR Notification Management";
1314  MinimumMargin: Decimal;
1315  begin
1316  MinimumMargin := MarginSetup.GetMinimumMarginPercentage(Rec."Manufacturer Code", Rec."Category Code",
1317  Rec."Subcategory Code", Rec."Series Code", Rec."Model Code");
1318  if "Margin %" >= MinimumMargin then
1319  exit;
1320  "Margin %" := MinimumMargin;
1321  if "Sales Price" <= 0 then
1322  exit;
1323  if xRec."Calc Currency Exchange Rate" <> Rec."Calc Currency Exchange Rate" then
1324  exit;
1325  if "List Price" = 0 then
1326  exit;
1327  NotificationManagement.CreateAndSendNotification(MarginTooLowResetingToMinimumErr, RecordId);
1328  end;
1329 
1330  internal procedure CheckMargingSetToMinimumMargin()
1331  var
1332  MarginSetup: Record "TSRD Margin Setup";
1333  NotificationManagement: Codeunit "TSR Notification Management";
1334  MinimumMargin: Decimal;
1335  begin
1336  if "List Price" = 0 then
1337  exit;
1338  MinimumMargin := MarginSetup.GetMinimumMarginPercentage(Rec."Manufacturer Code", Rec."Category Code",
1339  Rec."Subcategory Code", Rec."Series Code", Rec."Model Code");
1340  if ("Margin %" = MinimumMargin) and (xRec."Margin %" > Rec."Margin %") then
1341  NotificationManagement.CreateAndSendNotification(MarginTooLowResetingToMinimumErr, RecordId);
1342  end;
1343 
1344  procedure UpdateCalcSalesPrice()
1345  var
1346  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
1347  begin
1348  SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
1349  CalcForecastMgt.UpdateCalcSalesPrice(Rec, SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model");
1350  end;
1351 
1352  internal procedure UpdateMarginAndSalesPrice()
1353  var
1354  MarginSetup: Record "TSRD Margin Setup";
1355  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
1356  MinimumMargin: Decimal;
1357  begin
1358  SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
1359  if "Sales Price" = 0 then
1360  exit;
1361  if "Includes Sales Discount" then begin
1362  "Sales Price" := GetCalculatedUnitPrice();
1363  UpdateSalesPriceSCC();
1364  "Margin Amount" := GetCalculatedUnitPrice() - GetCalculatedUnitCost();
1365  "Margin %" := CalcForecastMgt.GetMarginPercentageFromSalesPrice(SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model", GetCalculatedUnitCost(), GetCalculatedUnitPrice());
1366  MinimumMargin := MarginSetup.GetMinimumMarginPercentage(Rec."Manufacturer Code", Rec."Category Code",
1367  Rec."Subcategory Code", Rec."Series Code", Rec."Model Code");
1368  if "Margin %" < MinimumMargin then begin
1369  if CurrFieldNo = FieldNo("Base Machine List Price") then
1370  "Base Machine List Price" := xRec."Base Machine List Price";
1371  UpdateListPrice();
1372  FixAccordingtoMinimumMargin();
1373  end;
1374  end
1375  else begin
1376  MinimumMargin := MarginSetup.GetMinimumMarginPercentage(Rec."Manufacturer Code", Rec."Category Code",
1377  Rec."Subcategory Code", Rec."Series Code", Rec."Model Code");
1378  if "Margin %" < MinimumMargin then
1379  FixAccordingtoMinimumMargin()
1380  else begin
1381  "Margin %" := CalcForecastMgt.GetMarginPercentageFromSalesPrice(SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model", GetCalculatedUnitCost(), "Sales Price");
1382  if "Margin %" < MinimumMargin then
1383  FixAccordingtoMinimumMargin();
1384  "Margin Amount" := "Sales Price" - GetCalculatedUnitCost();
1385  end;
1386  end;
1387  Rec.Modify();
1388  end;
1389 
1390  local procedure FixAccordingtoMinimumMargin()
1391  var
1392  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
1393  begin
1394  CheckAndFixMinimumMargin();
1395  "Sales Price" := CalcForecastMgt.GetSalesPriceWithMargin(GetCalculatedUnitCost(), "Margin %", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model");
1396  UpdateSalesPriceSCC();
1397  "Margin Amount" := "Sales Price" - GetCalculatedUnitCost();
1398  end;
1399 
1400  internal procedure UpdateSalesPrice()
1401  var
1402  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
1403  begin
1404  SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
1405  CalcForecastMgt.UpdateSalesPrice(Rec, SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model");
1406  UpdateSalesPriceInclVAT();
1407  end;
1408 
1409  local procedure UpdateCalcMarginPercentage()
1410  var
1411  MarginSetup: Record "TSRD Margin Setup";
1412  MarginPercentage: Decimal;
1413  begin
1414  MarginPercentage := MarginSetup.GetMarginPercentage("Manufacturer Code", "Category Code", "Subcategory Code", "Series Code", "Model Code");
1415  Validate("Calculated Margin %", MarginPercentage);
1416  Validate("Margin %", MarginPercentage);
1417  end;
1418 
1419  local procedure TestSystemCreatedFalse()
1420  begin
1421  if not SkipCheckSystemCreated or StatusCheckSuspended then
1422  TestField("System-Created", false);
1423  end;
1424 
1425  local procedure TestMandatoryFields()
1426  var
1427  ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRM Service Mgt.";
1428  begin
1429  TestField("Manufacturer Code");
1430  TestField("Category Code");
1431  TestField("Model Code");
1432  if ServiceMgt.IsSubcategoryMandatory() then
1433  TestField("Subcategory Code");
1434  if ServiceMgt.IsSeriesMandatory() then
1435  TestField("Series Code");
1436  end;
1437 
1438  local procedure CheckAttributesOnConfigurations()
1439  var
1440  CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
1441  AttributeChangeErr: Label '%1 cannot be changed since it is used in Configurations. Delete Configuration Lines in order to change %1.', Comment = '%1=Manufacturer Code/Category Code/Subcategory Code/Model Code';
1442  begin
1443  case CurrFieldNo of
1444  FieldNo("Manufacturer Code"):
1445  begin
1446  if xRec."Manufacturer Code" = '' then
1447  exit;
1448  if "Manufacturer Code" = xRec."Manufacturer Code" then
1449  exit;
1450  CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
1451  CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("Manufacturer Code", '<>%1', "Manufacturer Code");
1452  CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("No.", '<>%1', '');
1453  if not CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
1454  Error(AttributeChangeErr, FieldCaption("Manufacturer Code"));
1455  end;
1456  FieldNo("Category Code"):
1457  begin
1458  if xRec."Category Code" = '' then
1459  exit;
1460  if "Category Code" = xRec."Category Code" then
1461  exit;
1462  CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
1463  CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("Category Code", '<>%1', "Category Code");
1464  CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("No.", '<>%1', '');
1465  if not CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
1466  Error(AttributeChangeErr, FieldCaption("Category Code"));
1467  end;
1468  FieldNo("Subcategory Code"):
1469  begin
1470 
1471  if xRec."Subcategory Code" = '' then
1472  exit;
1473  if "Subcategory Code" = xRec."Subcategory Code" then
1474  exit;
1475  CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
1476  CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("Subcategory Code", '<>%1', "Subcategory Code");
1477  CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("No.", '<>%1', '');
1478  if not CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
1479  Error(AttributeChangeErr, FieldCaption("Subcategory Code"));
1480  end;
1481  FieldNo("Series Code"):
1482  begin
1483  if xRec."Series Code" = '' then
1484  exit;
1485  if "Series Code" = xRec."Series Code" then
1486  exit;
1487  CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
1488  CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("Series Code", '<>%1', "Model Code");
1489  CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("No.", '<>%1', '');
1490  if not CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
1491  Error(AttributeChangeErr, FieldCaption("Series Code"));
1492  end;
1493  FieldNo("Model Code"):
1494  begin
1495  if xRec."Model Code" = '' then
1496  exit;
1497  if "Model Code" = xRec."Model Code" then
1498  exit;
1499  CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
1500  CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("Model Code", '<>%1', "Model Code");
1501  CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("No.", '<>%1', '');
1502  if not CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
1503  Error(AttributeChangeErr, FieldCaption("Model Code"));
1504  end;
1505  end;
1506  end;
1507 
1508  internal procedure SetCalculationCurrencyFromVendor(VendorNo: Code[20])
1509  var
1510  Vendor: Record Vendor;
1511  ConfirmManagement: Codeunit "Confirm Management";
1512  ExchangeCurrencyConfirmMsg: Label 'The vendor has the currency code %1. Do you want to use it in calculation worksheet?', Comment = '%1 - Vendor Currency Code';
1513  begin
1514  if not Vendor.Get(VendorNo) then
1515  exit;
1516  if Vendor."Currency Code" = '' then
1517  exit;
1518  if Vendor."Currency Code" = Rec."Calculation Currency" then
1519  exit;
1520  if not ConfirmManagement.GetResponse(StrSubstNo(ExchangeCurrencyConfirmMsg, Vendor."Currency Code")) then
1521  exit;
1522  Rec.Validate("Calculation Currency", Vendor."Currency Code");
1523  Rec.Modify();
1524  end;
1525 
1526  procedure SetDoNotTestStatusOpen(NewDoNotTestStatusOpen: Boolean)
1527  begin
1528  DoNotTestStatusOpen := NewDoNotTestStatusOpen;
1529  end;
1530 
1531  procedure UpdateListPrice()
1532  var
1533  CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
1534  LineAmount: Decimal;
1535  begin
1536  CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
1537  CalcConfiguration.CalcSums("Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)", "Line Amount (List Price)");
1538  if "Show List Prices" then
1539  LineAmount := CalcConfiguration."Line Amount (List Price)"
1540  else
1541  LineAmount := CalcConfiguration."Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)";
1542  Validate("List Price", LineAmount + "Base Machine List Price");
1543  OnAfterUpdateListPrice(Rec, LineAmount);
1544  end;
1545 
1546  internal procedure SetIncludesSalesDiscount(NewIncludesSalesDiscount: Boolean)
1547  begin
1548  if "Includes Sales Discount" = NewIncludesSalesDiscount then
1549  exit;
1550 
1551  Validate("Includes Sales Discount", NewIncludesSalesDiscount);
1552  Modify();
1553  end;
1554 
1555  internal procedure GetTotalPurchDiscountPercentage(): Decimal
1556  var
1557  CalcPurchaseDiscounts: Record "TSRD Calc. Purchase Discounts";
1558  begin
1559  CalcPurchaseDiscounts.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
1560  CalcPurchaseDiscounts.CalcSums("Absolute Discount %");
1561  exit(CalcPurchaseDiscounts."Absolute Discount %");
1562  end;
1563 
1564  internal procedure InitOrderType()
1565  var
1566  UserSetup: Record "User Setup";
1567  begin
1568  if not UserSetup.Get(UserId()) then
1569  exit;
1570  if UserSetup."TSR Purchase Order Type" <> '' then
1571  Rec.Validate("Purchase Order Type", UserSetup."TSR Purchase Order Type");
1572  end;
1573 
1574  internal procedure InitResponsibilityCenter()
1575  var
1576  RespCenterSetupMgt: Codeunit "TSR Resp. Center Setup Mgt";
1577  RespCenterCode: Code[10];
1578  begin
1579  RespCenterCode := RespCenterSetupMgt.GetRespCenter("TSR Resp. Center Area"::Purchase, Rec."Vendor No.");
1580  if RespCenterCode <> '' then
1581  Rec.Validate("Responsibility Center", RespCenterCode);
1582  end;
1583 
1584  local procedure CheckIsReturnTypeEditable()
1585  var
1586  CalcTradeInPurch: Record "TSRD Calc. Trade-In/Purch";
1587  ReturnTypeErr: Label 'Return Type cannot be changed after Purchase/Trade-In/Agency Business document is created. Please first delete Purchase/Trade-In/Agency Business document if it is not posted.';
1588  begin
1589  CalcTradeInPurch.SetFilter("Document No.", '<>%1', '');
1590  CalcTradeInPurch.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
1591  if not CalcTradeInPurch.IsEmpty() then
1592  Error(ReturnTypeErr);
1593  end;
1594 
1595  local procedure TestSalesDiscountsEmpty(SalesCalculationOption: Text)
1596  var
1597  CalcSalesDiscounts: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Discounts";
1598  DiscountsErr: Label 'There are Sales Discounts defined. You have to delete them first to apply "%1"', Comment = '%1 - Configure Price Quote option you''re trying to apply';
1599  begin
1600  CalcSalesDiscounts.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
1601  if not CalcSalesDiscounts.IsEmpty() then
1602  Error(DiscountsErr, SalesCalculationOption);
1603  end;
1604 
1605  internal procedure EmptyCalculatedSalesPriceFields()
1606  var
1607  CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
1608  begin
1609  CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
1610  if CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
1611  exit;
1612 
1613  CalcConfiguration.ModifyAll("Calculated Sales Price", 0);
1614  CalcConfiguration.ModifyAll("Calculated Sales Amount", 0);
1615  end;
1616 
1617  procedure UpdateConfigCalculatedSalesPrices()
1618  var
1619  Currency: Record Currency;
1620  CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
1621  PriceWithoutMargin: Decimal;
1622  PurchDiscountMultiplier: Decimal;
1623  SalesPriceSplitTotal, SplitDiff : Decimal;
1624  SalesPriceWithMargin: Decimal;
1625  begin
1626  if not "Show calculated Sales Prices" then
1627  exit;
1628  if "List Price" = 0 then
1629  exit;
1630  SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
1631  Currency.Initialize('');
1632  GetCalculatedMachineSalesPrice(PriceWithoutMargin, SalesPriceWithMargin, PurchDiscountMultiplier, Currency);
1633  if SalesPriceWithMargin = 0 then
1634  exit;
1635  SalesPriceSplitTotal += "Calculated Machine Sales Price";
1636  CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
1637  CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("List Price", '<>%1', 0);
1638  CalcConfiguration.SetFilter(Quantity, '<>%1', 0);
1639  if CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
1640  exit;
1641  UpdateCalcConfigLinesCalculatedSalesPrices(CalcConfiguration, SalesPriceSplitTotal, PurchDiscountMultiplier, Currency);
1642 
1643  if SalesPriceSplitTotal <> SalesPriceWithMargin then begin
1644  SplitDiff := SalesPriceWithMargin - SalesPriceSplitTotal;
1645  CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount" -= SplitDiff;
1646  CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Price" := Round(CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount" / CalcConfiguration.Quantity, Currency."Unit-Amount Rounding Precision");
1647  CalcConfiguration.Modify();
1648  end;
1649  end;
1650 
1651  internal procedure UpdateConfigCalculatedSalesPrices(var CurrCalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration")
1652  var
1653  Currency: Record Currency;
1654  CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
1655  PriceWithoutMargin: Decimal;
1656  PurchDiscountMultiplier: Decimal;
1657  SalesPriceSplitTotal, SplitDiff : Decimal;
1658  SalesPriceWithMargin: Decimal;
1659  begin
1660  if not "Show calculated Sales Prices" then
1661  exit;
1662  if "List Price" = 0 then
1663  exit;
1664  SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
1665  Currency.Initialize('');
1666  GetCalculatedMachineSalesPrice(PriceWithoutMargin, SalesPriceWithMargin, PurchDiscountMultiplier, Currency);
1667  if SalesPriceWithMargin = 0 then
1668  exit;
1669  SalesPriceSplitTotal += "Calculated Machine Sales Price";
1670  CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
1671  CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("No.", '<>%1', CurrCalcConfiguration."No.");
1672  CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("List Price", '<>%1', 0);
1673  CalcConfiguration.SetFilter(Quantity, '<>%1', 0);
1674  if CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
1675  exit;
1676  UpdateCalcConfigLinesCalculatedSalesPrices(CalcConfiguration, SalesPriceSplitTotal, PurchDiscountMultiplier, Currency);
1677 
1678  if SalesPriceSplitTotal <> SalesPriceWithMargin then begin
1679  SplitDiff := SalesPriceWithMargin - SalesPriceSplitTotal;
1680  CurrCalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount" -= SplitDiff;
1681  CurrCalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Price" := Round(CurrCalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount" / CurrCalcConfiguration.Quantity, Currency."Unit-Amount Rounding Precision");
1682  CurrCalcConfiguration.Modify();
1683  end;
1684  end;
1685 
1686  local procedure GetCalculatedMachineSalesPrice(var PriceWithoutMargin: Decimal; var SalesPriceWithMargin: Decimal; var PurchDiscountMultiplier: Decimal; Currency: Record Currency)
1687  var
1688  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
1689  begin
1690  CalcFields("Total Discount", "Dir unit cost with Calc. Disc", "Configuration Price", "List Price Conf. Options");
1691  if "Show List Prices" then
1692  PriceWithoutMargin := "List Price Conf. Options" + GetBaseMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc() - "Total Discount"
1693  else
1694  PriceWithoutMargin := "Configuration Price" + GetBaseMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc() - "Total Discount";
1695 
1696  SalesPriceWithMargin := Round(CalcForecastMgt.GetSalesPriceWithMargin(PriceWithoutMargin,
1697  "Margin %",
1698  SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model"), Currency."Amount Rounding Precision");
1699  if (SalesPriceWithMargin = 0) or ("List Price" = 0) then begin
1700  "Calculated Machine Sales Price" := 0;
1701  exit;
1702  end;
1703  if "Total Discount" <> 0 then
1704  PurchDiscountMultiplier := 1 - "Total Discount" / ("Dir unit cost with Calc. Disc" + GetBaseMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc())
1705  else
1706  PurchDiscountMultiplier := 1;
1707 
1708  "Calculated Machine Sales Price" := Round(CalcForecastMgt.GetSalesPriceWithMargin(GetBaseMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc() * PurchDiscountMultiplier, "Margin %", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model"), Currency."Amount Rounding Precision");
1709  end;
1710 
1711  local procedure UpdateCalcConfigLinesCalculatedSalesPrices(var CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration"; var SalesPriceSplitTotal: Decimal; PurchDiscountMultiplier: Decimal; Currency: Record Currency)
1712  var
1713  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
1714  begin
1715  CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Calculate Discount", true);
1716  if not CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then begin
1717  CalcConfiguration.FindSet();
1718  repeat
1719  CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount" := Round(CalcForecastMgt.GetSalesPriceWithMargin(CalcConfiguration."Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)" * PurchDiscountMultiplier, "Margin %", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model"), Currency."Amount Rounding Precision");
1720  CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Price" := CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount" / CalcConfiguration.Quantity;
1721  CalcConfiguration.Modify();
1722  SalesPriceSplitTotal += CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount";
1723  until CalcConfiguration.Next() = 0;
1724  end;
1725 
1726  CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Calculate Discount", false);
1727  if not CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then begin
1728  CalcConfiguration.FindSet();
1729  repeat
1730  CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount" := Round(CalcForecastMgt.GetSalesPriceWithMargin(CalcConfiguration."Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)", "Margin %", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model"), Currency."Amount Rounding Precision");
1731  CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Price" := CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount" / CalcConfiguration.Quantity;
1732  CalcConfiguration.Modify();
1733  SalesPriceSplitTotal += CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount";
1734  until CalcConfiguration.Next() = 0;
1735  end;
1736  end;
1737 
1738  internal procedure PrefillVATProdPostingGroup()
1739  var
1740  CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
1741  begin
1742  if "Calc. Sales Forecast No." = '' then
1743  exit;
1744  CalcSalesForecast.Get("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", "Version No.");
1745  PrefillVATProdPostingGroup(CalcSalesForecast, true);
1746  end;
1747 
1748  internal procedure PrefillVATProdPostingGroup(CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast")
1749  begin
1750  PrefillVATProdPostingGroup(CalcSalesForecast, false);
1751  end;
1752 
1753  local procedure PrefillVATProdPostingGroup(CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast"; ExecuteValidate: Boolean)
1754  var
1755  Item: Record Item;
1756  ServiceItem: Record "Service Item";
1757  VATPostingSetup: Record "VAT Posting Setup";
1758  begin
1759  if not CalcSalesForecast."Sales Price incl. VAT" then
1760  exit;
1761  if Rec."Service Item No." = '' then begin
1762  Clear(Rec."VAT Prod. Posting Group");
1763  exit;
1764  end;
1765  ServiceItem.Get(Rec."Service Item No.");
1766  if not Item.Get(ServiceItem."Item No.") then
1767  exit;
1768 
1769  VATPostingSetup.Get(CalcSalesForecast."VAT Bus. Posting Group", Item."VAT Prod. Posting Group");
1770  if ExecuteValidate then
1771  Rec.Validate("VAT Prod. Posting Group", Item."VAT Prod. Posting Group")
1772  else
1773  Rec."VAT Prod. Posting Group" := Item."VAT Prod. Posting Group";
1774 
1775  UpdateVATPercentage(VATPostingSetup);
1776  end;
1777 
1778  local procedure UpdateVATPercentage(VATPostingSetup: Record "VAT Posting Setup")
1779  var
1780  VATCalculationTypeErr: Label 'Calculation Type Full VAT in VAT Posting Setup is not possible in Configure Price Quote';
1781  begin
1782  case VATPostingSetup."VAT Calculation Type" of
1783  VATPostingSetup."VAT Calculation Type"::"Reverse Charge VAT",
1784  VATPostingSetup."VAT Calculation Type"::"Sales Tax":
1785  "VAT %" := 0;
1786  VATPostingSetup."VAT Calculation Type"::"Normal VAT":
1787  "VAT %" := VATPostingSetup."VAT %";
1788  VATPostingSetup."VAT Calculation Type"::"Full VAT":
1789  Error(VATCalculationTypeErr);
1790  end;
1791  UpdateVATAmount();
1792  UpdateSalesPriceInclVAT();
1793  end;
1794 
1795  internal procedure UpdateVAT()
1796  var
1797  CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
1798  VATPostingSetup: Record "VAT Posting Setup";
1799  begin
1800  if "Calc. Sales Forecast No." = '' then
1801  exit;
1802  CalcSalesForecast.Get("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", "Version No.");
1803  if not CalcSalesForecast."Sales Price incl. VAT" then
1804  exit;
1805  if not VATPostingSetup.Get(CalcSalesForecast."VAT Bus. Posting Group", "VAT Prod. Posting Group") then
1806  exit;
1807  UpdateVATPercentage(VATPostingSetup);
1808  end;
1809 
1810  local procedure UpdateSalesPriceInclVAT()
1811  begin
1812  "Sales Price incl. VAT" := "Sales Price" * (1 + "VAT %" / 100);
1813  end;
1814 
1815  local procedure UpdateVATAmount()
1816  begin
1817  "VAT Amount" := "Sales Price" * ("VAT %" / 100);
1818  end;
1819 
1820  local procedure SetCalculationCurrency()
1821  var
1822  Manufacturer: Record Manufacturer;
1823  begin
1824  if "Manufacturer Code" = '' then begin
1825  Clear("Calculation Currency");
1826  exit;
1827  end;
1828  Manufacturer.Get("Manufacturer Code");
1829  if ("Sales Currency" = Manufacturer."TSRD Calculation Currency Code") and
1830  (Manufacturer."TSRD Calculation Currency Code" <> '') then
1831  Error(SameSalesAndCalcCurrencyErr);
1832  if Manufacturer."TSRD Calculation Currency Code" <> '' then
1833  Validate("Calculation Currency", Manufacturer."TSRD Calculation Currency Code");
1834  end;
1835 
1836  internal procedure PrefillSalesCurrency()
1837  var
1838  CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
1839  begin
1840  if "Calc. Sales Forecast No." = '' then
1841  exit;
1842  CalcSalesForecast.Get("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", "Version No.");
1843  if (CalcSalesForecast."Sales Currency" = "Calculation Currency") and (CalcSalesForecast."Sales Currency" <> '') then
1844  Error(SameSalesAndCalcCurrencyErr);
1845  Validate("Sales Currency", CalcSalesForecast."Sales Currency");
1846  Validate("Sales Currency Exchange Rate", CalcSalesForecast."Sales Currency Exchange Rate");
1847  end;
1848 
1849  local procedure UpdateAllPricesWithMultiplier()
1850  var
1851  CurrencyExchangeRate: Record "Currency Exchange Rate";
1852  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
1853  CurrSalesPrice: Decimal;
1854  ExchangeRate: Decimal;
1855  PriceMultuplier: Decimal;
1856  xExchangeRate: Decimal;
1857  begin
1858  if Rec."Calculation Currency" = xRec."Calculation Currency" then
1859  exit;
1860  ExchangeRate := CurrencyExchangeRate.ExchangeRate(Today(), Rec."Calculation Currency");
1861  xExchangeRate := CurrencyExchangeRate.ExchangeRate(Today(), xRec."Calculation Currency");
1862 
1863  if (ExchangeRate = 0) or (xExchangeRate = 0) then
1864  exit;
1865 
1866  PriceMultuplier := ExchangeRate / xExchangeRate;
1867  if PriceMultuplier = 1 then
1868  exit;
1869  CalcForecastMgt.UpdateAllForecastPricesWithMultiplier(Rec."No.", PriceMultuplier);
1870  CurrSalesPrice := "Sales Price";
1871  "Base Machine List Price" := "Base Machine List Price" * PriceMultuplier;
1872  UpdateListPrice();
1873  CalcForecastMgt.RecalculatePurchDiscountsOnDealerNetPriceChange(Rec);
1874  UpdateCalcSalesPrice();
1875  Validate("Sales Price", CurrSalesPrice * PriceMultuplier);
1876  end;
1877 
1878  local procedure CheckCalcWorkShopForSeparate()
1879  var
1880  CalcWorkshop: Record "TSRD Calc. Workshop";
1881  SeparateWorkshopErr: Label 'There are Services with "Calculate Separately" defined. You have to delete them first to Allow Fix Price.';
1882  begin
1883  CalcWorkshop.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
1884  CalcWorkshop.SetRange("Calculate Separately", true);
1885  if not CalcWorkshop.IsEmpty() then
1886  Error(SeparateWorkshopErr);
1887  end;
1888 
1889  local procedure CheckCalcExternalEquipmentForSeparate()
1890  var
1891  CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
1892  SeparateEquipmentErr: Label 'There are Additional Configurations with "Calculate Separately" defined. You have to delete them first to Allow Fix Price.';
1893  begin
1894  CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
1895  CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Calculate Separately", true);
1896  if not CalcExternalEquipment.IsEmpty() then
1897  Error(SeparateEquipmentErr);
1898  end;
1899 
1900  internal procedure ReInitOrderTypeAndResponsibilityCenter()
1901  var
1902  CalcTradeInPurch: Record "TSRD Calc. Trade-In/Purch";
1903  begin
1904  CalcTradeInPurch.SetRange("Forecast No.", Rec."No.");
1905  if CalcTradeInPurch.IsEmpty() then
1906  exit;
1907  CalcTradeInPurch.FindSet(true);
1908  repeat
1909  CalcTradeInPurch.InitOrderType();
1910  CalcTradeInPurch.InitResponsibilityCenter();
1911  CalcTradeInPurch.Modify(true);
1912  until CalcTradeInPurch.Next() = 0;
1913  end;
1914 
1915  procedure UpdateAllPriceRelatedFields()
1916  begin
1917  UpdateListPrice();
1918  UpdateCalcMarginPercentage();
1919  UpdateMarginAndSalesPrice();
1920  end;
1921 
1922  local procedure UpdateCalcSalesPriceSCC()
1923  var
1924  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
1925  begin
1926  Validate("Calculated Sales Price (SCC)", CalcForecastMgt.ExchangeAmtFCYtoFCY("Calc Currency Exchange Rate", "Sales Currency Exchange Rate", "Calculated Sales Price"));
1927  end;
1928 
1929  internal procedure UpdateSalesPriceSCC()
1930  var
1931  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
1932  begin
1933  Validate("Sales Price (SCC)", CalcForecastMgt.ExchangeAmtFCYtoFCY("Calc Currency Exchange Rate", "Sales Currency Exchange Rate", "Sales Price"));
1934  end;
1935 
1936  local procedure UpdateSalesPriceFromSCC()
1937  var
1938  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
1939  begin
1940  Validate("Sales Price", CalcForecastMgt.ExchangeAmtFCYtoFCY("Sales Currency Exchange Rate", "Calc Currency Exchange Rate", "Sales Price (SCC)"));
1941  end;
1942 
1943  local procedure PrefillCalcExchangeRate()
1944  var
1945  CurrencyExchangeRate: Record "Currency Exchange Rate";
1946  LatestDate: Date;
1947  ExchangeRateAmount: Decimal;
1948  begin
1949  if "Calculation Currency" = '' then begin
1950  Validate("Calc Currency Exchange Rate", 1);
1951  exit;
1952  end;
1953  CurrencyExchangeRate.GetLastestExchangeRate("Calculation Currency", LatestDate, ExchangeRateAmount);
1954  Validate("Calc Currency Exchange Rate", ExchangeRateAmount);
1955  end;
1956 
1957  local procedure GetCaptionWithCurrencyCode(CaptionWithoutCurrencyCode: Text; Currency: Code[10]): Text
1958  var
1959  GeneralLedgerSetup: Record "General Ledger Setup";
1960  begin
1961  if Currency = '' then
1962  exit(CaptionWithoutCurrencyCode);
1963  GeneralLedgerSetup.Get();
1964  if Currency = GeneralLedgerSetup."LCY Code" then
1965  exit(CaptionWithoutCurrencyCode);
1966  exit(StrSubstNo('%1 (%2)', CaptionWithoutCurrencyCode, Currency));
1967  end;
1968 
1969  local procedure CheckServItemCalculation()
1970  var
1971  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
1972  ServItemCalcErr: Label 'There already exist a Service Item Calculation Worksheet for Service Item No. %1', Comment = '%1 Service Item No.';
1973  begin
1974  if not Rec."Service Item Calculation" then
1975  exit;
1976  if CalcForecastMgt.HasServiceItemCalculation(Rec."Service Item No.") then
1977  Error(ServItemCalcErr, Rec."Service Item No.");
1978  end;
1979 
1980  procedure CreatePurchaseOrder()
1981  var
1982  CalcForecastToPurch: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast To Purch";
1983  begin
1984  CalcForecastToPurch.CreatePurchaseOrder(Rec);
1985  end;
1986 
1987  procedure OpenPurchaseDocument()
1988  var
1989  CalcForecastToPurch: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast To Purch";
1990  begin
1991  CalcForecastToPurch.OpenPurchaseDocument(Rec."Purchase Document Type", Rec."Purchase Document No.");
1992  end;
1993 
1994  procedure OpenListOfPOs()
1995  var
1996  PurchaseHeader: Record "Purchase Header";
1997  begin
1998  if not Rec.Template then
1999  exit;
2000  PurchaseHeader.FilterGroup(2);
2001  PurchaseHeader.SetRange("Document Type", PurchaseHeader."Document Type"::Order);
2002  PurchaseHeader.SetRange("TSRD Forecast No.", Rec."No.");
2003  PurchaseHeader.FilterGroup(0);
2004  Page.Run(Page::"Purchase Order List", PurchaseHeader);
2005  end;
2006 
2007  internal procedure CopyUnitCostOfServiceItem()
2008  var
2009  ServiceItem: Record "Service Item";
2010  ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRM Service Mgt.";
2011  UnitCost: Decimal;
2012  begin
2013  if "Service Item No." = '' then begin
2014  if CheckLinkedDocument() then
2015  SetBaseMachinePrice(0);
2016  exit;
2017  end;
2018  ServiceItem.Get(Rec."Service Item No.");
2019  ServiceMgt.CalculateServiceItemCardUnitCost(ServiceItem, UnitCost, false);
2020  if not GetSkipBaseMachineListPrice() then
2021  SetBaseMachinePrice(UnitCost);
2022  end;
2023 
2024  local procedure CheckLinkedDocument(): Boolean
2025  var
2026  PurchInvLine: Record "Purch. Inv. Line";
2027  PurchaseLine: Record "Purchase Line";
2028  begin
2029  if (xRec."Service Item No." = '') or (Rec."Purchase Document No." = '') then
2030  exit(true);
2031  PurchaseLine.SetRange("Document Type", "Purchase Document Type"::Order);
2032  PurchaseLine.SetRange("Document No.", Rec."Purchase Document No.");
2033  PurchaseLine.SetRange("TSRM Service Item No.", xRec."Service Item No.");
2034 
2035  PurchInvLine.SetRange("Document No.", Rec."Purchase Document No.");
2036  PurchInvLine.SetRange("TSRM Service Item No.", xRec."Service Item No.");
2037  if PurchaseLine.IsEmpty() and PurchInvLine.IsEmpty() then
2038  exit(true);
2039  end;
2040 
2041  internal procedure HandleEquipment()
2042  var
2043  EquipmentMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Equipment Mgt.";
2044  begin
2045  EquipmentMgt.TransferStandardEquipmentAndModel(Rec, xRec);
2046  EquipmentMgt.DeleteForecastEquipmentOnServItemNoValidate(Rec, xRec);
2047  EquipmentMgt.DeleteServiceItemLinkedEquipment(Rec);
2048  EquipmentMgt.CopyServiceItemEquipmentToForecast(Rec);
2049  EquipmentMgt.ServiceItemEquipmentToStandardEquipment(Rec);
2050  end;
2051 
2052  local procedure SetBaseMachinePrice(NewBasePrice: Decimal)
2053  var
2054  Margin: Decimal;
2055  begin
2056  Margin := "Margin %";
2057  Validate("Base Machine List Price", NewBasePrice);
2058  Validate("Margin %", Margin);
2059  end;
2060 
2061  internal procedure SetBaseMachineListPrice()
2062  var
2063  ServiceItem: Record "Service Item";
2064  ConfirmMgt: Codeunit "Confirm Management";
2065  ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRM Service Mgt.";
2066  UnitCost: Decimal;
2067  ConfirmLbl: Label 'Calculation Review is not approved. When creating a Calculation Worksheet, the Base Machine List Price will be set to ''0'', do you want to continue?';
2068  begin
2069  if Rec."Service Item No." = '' then
2070  exit;
2071  ServiceItem.Get(Rec."Service Item No.");
2072  SalesReceivablesSetup.GetRecordOnce();
2073  case SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Base Machine List Price" of
2074  "TSRD Base Machine List Price"::"Unit Cost of Service Item":
2075  ServiceMgt.CalculateServiceItemCardUnitCost(ServiceItem, UnitCost, false);
2076  "TSRD Base Machine List Price"::"Calculation Unit Cost":
2077  if not (ServiceItem."TSRM Calc. Review Status" in [
2078  "TSRM Calc. Review Status"::Approved,
2079  "TSRM Calc. Review Status"::"No Calc. Review Required"
2080  ])
2081  then begin
2082  if not ConfirmMgt.GetResponse(ConfirmLbl) then
2083  Error('')
2084  else
2085  UnitCost := 0
2086  end else
2087  UnitCost := ServiceItem."TSRM Calc. Unit Cost";
2088  end;
2089  SetBaseMachinePrice(UnitCost);
2090  end;
2091 
2092  internal procedure TestStatusOpenSalesCalc()
2093  var
2094  CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
2095  begin
2096  CalcSalesForecast.SetFilter("No.", Rec.GetFilter("Calc. Sales Forecast No."));
2097  CalcSalesForecast.SetFilter("Version No.", Rec.GetFilter("Version No."));
2098  if CalcSalesForecast.IsEmpty() then
2099  exit;
2100  CalcSalesForecast.FindFirst();
2101  CalcSalesForecast.TestStatusOpen();
2102  end;
2103 
2104  internal procedure SetStatusCheckSuspended(Suspend: Boolean)
2105  begin
2106  StatusCheckSuspended := Suspend;
2107  end;
2108 
2109  internal procedure GetStatusCheckSuspended(): Boolean
2110  begin
2111  exit(StatusCheckSuspended);
2112  end;
2113 
2114  internal procedure SetSkipBaseMachineListPrice(Skip: Boolean)
2115  begin
2116  SkipBaseMachineListPrice := Skip;
2117  end;
2118 
2119  internal procedure GetSkipBaseMachineListPrice(): Boolean
2120  begin
2121  exit(SkipBaseMachineListPrice);
2122  end;
2123 
2124  internal procedure SetSkipRelatedActivities(Skip: Boolean)
2125  begin
2126  SkipRelatedActivities := Skip;
2127  end;
2128 
2129  internal procedure GetSkipRelatedActivities(): Boolean
2130  begin
2131  exit(SkipRelatedActivities);
2132  end;
2133 
2134  procedure GetSalesCalculationStatus(): Enum "TSRD Sales Calculation Status"
2135  var
2136  CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
2137  begin
2138  if not CalcSalesForecast.Get("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", "Version No.") then
2139  exit("TSRD Sales Calculation Status"::" ");
2140  exit(CalcSalesForecast."Sales Calculation Status");
2141  end;
2142 
2143  protected var
2144  SkipCheckSystemCreated: Boolean;
2145  SkipUpdatePurchaseHeader: Boolean;
2146 
2147  var
2148  SalesReceivablesSetup: Record "Sales & Receivables Setup";
2149  NoSeries: Codeunit "No. Series";
2150  DoNotTestStatusOpen: Boolean;
2151  FromCPQDelete: Boolean;
2152  SkipBaseMachineListPrice: Boolean;
2153  SkipRelatedActivities: Boolean;
2154  StatusCheckSuspended: Boolean;
2155  CalculatedMarginLbl: Label 'Calc. ';
2156  MarginTooLowResetingToMinimumErr: Label 'Margin too low. Reseting to minimum margin';
2157  SameSalesAndCalcCurrencyErr: Label 'You can''t set up the same value for Sales and Calculation Currency.';
2158 
2159  [IntegrationEvent(false, false)]
2160  local procedure OnAfterGetStatusStyleText(Rec: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast"; var StatusStyleText: Text)
2161  begin
2162  end;
2163 
2164  [IntegrationEvent(false, false)]
2165  local procedure OnBeforeGetBaseMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalculation(var CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast"; var Handled: Boolean; var BaseMachineListPriceSales: Decimal)
2166  begin
2167  end;
2168 
2169  [IntegrationEvent(false, false)]
2170  local procedure OnBeforeGetMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalculation(CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast"; var Handled: Boolean; var ListPriceSales: Decimal)
2171  begin
2172  end;
2173 
2174  [IntegrationEvent(false, false)]
2175  local procedure OnAfterUpdateListPrice(var CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast"; LineAmount: Decimal)
2176  begin
2177  end;
2178 
2179 }
+48 −1
1 page 5446016 "TSRD Calc. Forecast FactBox"
2 {
3  Caption = 'Worksheet Calculations';
4  PageType = CardPart;
5  SourceTable = "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
6 
7  layout
8  {
9  area(Content)
10  {
11  group(GroupName)
12  {
13  ShowCaption = false;
14  label(PurchaseCostsLabel)
15  {
16  ApplicationArea = All;
17  CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(PurchaseCostsLbl, Rec."No.");
18  Style = Strong;
19  }
20  field("Base Machine List Price"; Rec."Base Machine List Price")
21  {
22  ApplicationArea = All;
23  CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Base Machine List Price"), Rec."No.");
24  ToolTip = 'Specifies Base Machine List Price for Calculation Worksheet.';
25  }
26  field("Configuration Price"; Rec."Configuration Price")
27  {
28  ApplicationArea = All;
29  ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the Configuration Price.';
30  }
31  field("List Price"; Rec."List Price")
32  {
33  ApplicationArea = All;
34  ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the List Price field';
35  }
36  field("Total Discount"; Rec."Total Discount")
37  {
38  ApplicationArea = All;
39  Caption = 'Total Purchase Discount';
40  CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Total Discount"), Rec."No.");
41  ToolTip = 'Specifies the sum of Discount Amounts from all Purchase discount lines.';
42  }
43  field("Equipment Price"; Rec."Equipment Price")
44  {
45  ApplicationArea = All;
46  CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Equipment Price"), Rec."No.");
47  ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the Total Additional Configuration Calculated Sales Price field';
48  }
49  field("Workshop Amount"; Rec."Workshop Amount")
50  {

352 
353  var
354+ SalesReceivablesSetup: Record "Sales & Receivables Setup";
355  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
356  ShowOverAllowancePrice: Boolean;
357  CalculatedUnitCosts: Decimal;
358  DirectCosts: Decimal;
359  PaymentAmt: Decimal;
360  PaymentAmtSCC: Decimal;
361  PurchaseTradeInAmt: Decimal;
362  SalesPriceWithoutSeparately: Decimal;
363+ SalesPriceTotal: Decimal;
364+ TotalCostsAmount: Decimal;
365+ TotalMargin: Decimal;
366+ TotalMarginPct: Decimal;
367  UnitPriceInclDiscounts: Decimal;
368  UnitPriceInclWorkshops: Decimal;
369  CalculatedUnitCostsLbl: Label 'Calculated Unit Costs';
370  PaymentAmountLbl: Label 'Payment Amount';
371  PurchaseCostsLbl: Label 'Purchase Costs';
372+ SalesPriceTotalLbl: Label 'Sales Price Total';
373  SalesPriceWithoutSeparateLbl: Label 'Sales Price (without Separate)';
374+ TotalCostsAmountLbl: Label 'Total Costs Amount';
375+ TotalMarginLbl: Label 'Total';
376 
377  trigger OnAfterGetRecord()
378  begin
379  CalcUnitPrices();
380  CurrPage.Update(false);
381  end;
382 
383  local procedure CalcUnitPrices()
384  begin
385  CalculatedUnitCosts := Rec.GetCalculatedUnitCost();
386  if Rec."Includes Sales Discount" then
387  SalesPriceWithoutSeparately := Rec.GetCalculatedUnitPrice()
388  else
389  SalesPriceWithoutSeparately := Rec.GetCalculatedUnitCost();
·- Rec.CalcFields("Equipment (Separate)", "Workshop (Separate)", "Over-Allowance Price");
390+ Rec.CalcFields("Equipment (Separate)", "Workshop (Separate)", "Over-Allowance Price",
391+ "Additional Config. (Sep.) SP", "Additional Config. (Sep.) Cost",
392+ "Services (Separate) SP", "Services (Separate) Amount",
393+ "Costs (Separate) SP", "Costs (Separate) Amount");
394  if Rec."Over-Allowance Price" <> 0 then begin
395  ShowOverAllowancePrice := true;
396  PurchaseTradeInAmt := CalcForecastMgt.CalculatePurchaseAmount(Rec, true) + Rec."Over-Allowance Price";
397  end else begin
398  ShowOverAllowancePrice := false;
399  PurchaseTradeInAmt := CalcForecastMgt.CalculatePurchaseAmount(Rec, false);
400  end;
401 
·- PaymentAmt := Rec."Sales Price" - PurchaseTradeInAmt + Rec."Equipment (Separate)" + Rec."Workshop (Separate)";
402+ SalesPriceTotal := Rec."Sales Price"
403+ + Rec."Additional Config. (Sep.) SP"
404+ + Rec."Services (Separate) SP"
405+ + Rec."Costs (Separate) SP";
406+ TotalCostsAmount := CalculatedUnitCosts
407+ + Rec."Additional Config. (Sep.) Cost"
408+ + Rec."Services (Separate) Amount"
409+ + Rec."Costs (Separate) Amount";
410+ SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
411+ TotalMargin := SalesPriceTotal - TotalCostsAmount;
412+ TotalMarginPct := CalcForecastMgt.GetMarginPercentage(TotalCostsAmount, SalesPriceTotal, SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model");
413+
414+ PaymentAmt := SalesPriceTotal - PurchaseTradeInAmt;
415  PaymentAmtSCC := CalcForecastMgt.ExchangeAmtFCYtoFCY(Rec."Calc Currency Exchange Rate", Rec."Sales Currency Exchange Rate", PaymentAmt);
416  end;
417 
418  local procedure GetReturnCaption() Caption: Text
419  var
420  GeneralLedgerSetup: Record "General Ledger Setup";
421  OveraAllowanceLbl: Label 'Trade-In/Purchases';
422  PurchaseLbl: Label 'Purchases';
423  TradeInLbl: Label 'Trade-Ins';
424  CalculationCurrencySuffix: Text;
425  begin
426  if (Rec."Calculation Currency" <> '') and (Rec."Calculation Currency" <> GeneralLedgerSetup."LCY Code") then
427  CalculationCurrencySuffix := StrSubstNo(' (%1)', Rec."Calculation Currency");
428 
429  case Rec."Return Type" of
430  Rec."Return Type"::Purchase:
431  Caption := PurchaseLbl;
432  Rec."Return Type"::"Trade-In":
433  exit(TradeInLbl + CalculationCurrencySuffix);
434  end;
435  Rec.CalcFields("Over-Allowance Price");
436  if Rec."Over-Allowance Price" <> 0 then
437  Caption := OveraAllowanceLbl;
438 
439  exit(Caption);
440  end;
441 }
+85 −8
1 table 5446009 "TSRD Calc. Workshop"
2 {
3  Caption = 'Services';
4  DataClassification = CustomerContent;
5  DrillDownPageId = "TSRD Calc. Workshop Lookup";
6  LookupPageId = "TSRD Calc. Workshop Lookup";
7 
8  //Always update archive table as well!
9 
10  fields
11  {
12  field(1; "Forecast No."; Code[20])
13  {
14  Caption = 'Calculation Worksheet No.';
15  DataClassification = CustomerContent;
16  OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
17  TableRelation = "TSRD Calc. Forecast"."No.";
18  }
19  field(2; "Line No."; Integer)
20  {
21  Caption = 'Line No.';
22  DataClassification = CustomerContent;
23  }
24  field(5; "Calculate Separately"; Boolean)
25  {
26  Caption = 'Calculate Separately';
27  DataClassification = CustomerContent;
28+ ObsoleteReason = 'Replaced by Charging Method. #29748';
29+ ObsoleteState = Pending;
30+ ObsoleteTag = '2602.260200';
31 
32  trigger OnValidate()
33  begin
34  if "Calculate Separately" then begin
35  "Show in Sales Document" := true;
36  CalcForecast.Get("Forecast No.");
37  CalcForecast.TestField("Fix Price allowed", false);
38  end;
39  end;
40  }
41  field(6; "Show in Sales Document"; Boolean)
42  {
43  Caption = 'Show in Sales Document';
44  DataClassification = CustomerContent;
45  }
46  field(7; "Standard Service Code"; Code[20])
47  {
48  Caption = 'Standard Service Code';
49  DataClassification = CustomerContent;
50  OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
51  TableRelation = "Standard Service Code".Code;
52 
53  trigger OnLookup()
54  var
55  StandardServiceCode: Record "Standard Service Code";
56  CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
57  begin
58  CalcForecast.Get("Forecast No.");
59  CalcForecast.TestField("Manufacturer Code");
60  StandardServiceCode.FilterGroup(2);
61  StandardServiceCode.SetFilter("TSRD Manufacturer Code", '%1|%2', CalcForecast."Manufacturer Code", '');
62  StandardServiceCode.SetFilter("TSRD Category Code", '%1|%2', CalcForecast."Category Code", '');
63  StandardServiceCode.SetFilter("TSRD Subcategory Code", '%1|%2', CalcForecast."Subcategory Code", '');
64  StandardServiceCode.SetFilter("TSRD Series Code", '%1|%2', CalcForecast."Series Code", '');
65  StandardServiceCode.SetFilter("TSRD Model Code", '%1|%2', CalcForecast."Model Code", '');
66  StandardServiceCode.FilterGroup(0);
67  if Page.RunModal(Page::"Standard Service Codes", StandardServiceCode) = Action::LookupOK then
68  Validate("Standard Service Code", StandardServiceCode.Code);
69  end;
70 
71  trigger OnValidate()
72  var
73  StandardServiceCode: Record "Standard Service Code";
74  TempCalcWorkshop: Record "TSRD Calc. Workshop" temporary;
75  begin
76  TempCalcWorkshop := Rec;
77  Init();
78  "Forecast No." := TempCalcWorkshop."Forecast No.";
79  "Line No." := TempCalcWorkshop."Line No.";
80  "Standard Service Code" := TempCalcWorkshop."Standard Service Code";
81  "Service Order Type" := TempCalcWorkshop."Service Order Type";
82  "Responsibility Center" := TempCalcWorkshop."Responsibility Center";
83  "Location Code" := TempCalcWorkshop."Location Code";
84  if not StandardServiceCode.Get("Standard Service Code") then
85  exit;
86  StandardServiceCode.CalcFields("TSRD Default Worktime Amount");
87  "Default Worktime Amount" := StandardServiceCode."TSRD Default Worktime Amount";
88  Description := StandardServiceCode.Description;
89  if not StandardServiceCode."TSRD Fix Price Active" then
90  exit;
91  Validate("Amount (Labor)", StandardServiceCode."TSRD Fix Price Labor");
92  Validate("Amount (Parts)", StandardServiceCode."TSRD Fix Price Parts");
93  end;
94  }
95  field(10; Description; Text[100])
96  {
97  Caption = 'Description';
98  DataClassification = CustomerContent;
99  OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
100  }
101  field(11; "Default Worktime Amount"; Decimal)
102  {
103  BlankZero = true;
104  Caption = 'Default Worktime Amount';
105  DataClassification = CustomerContent;
106  }
107  field(13; "Amount (Labor)"; Decimal)
108  {
109  BlankZero = true;
110  Caption = 'Amount (Labor)';
111  DataClassification = CustomerContent;
112  trigger OnValidate()
113  begin
114  UpdateTotalAmount();
115  end;
116  }
117  field(14; "Amount (Parts)"; Decimal)
118  {
119  BlankZero = true;
120  Caption = 'Amount (Parts)';
121  DataClassification = CustomerContent;
122  trigger OnValidate()
123  begin
124  UpdateTotalAmount();
125  end;
126  }
127  field(15; "Total Amount"; Decimal)
128  {
129  BlankZero = true;
130  Caption = 'Total Amount';
131  DataClassification = CustomerContent;
132  trigger OnValidate()
133  begin
134  if "Total Amount" <> xRec."Total Amount" then begin
135  "Amount (Labor)" := 0;
136  "Amount (Parts)" := 0;
137  exit;
138  end;
139  UpdateTotalAmount();
140  end;
141  }
142  field(20; "Service Document Type"; Option)
143  {
144  Caption = 'Service Document Type';
145  DataClassification = CustomerContent;
146  Editable = false;
147  OptionCaption = ' ,Order,Quote,Invoice';
148  OptionMembers = " ","Order",Quote,Invoice;
149  }
150  field(21; "Service Document No."; Code[20])
151  {
152  Caption = 'Service Document';
153  DataClassification = CustomerContent;
154  Editable = false;
155  OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
156  }
157  field(22; "External Equipment Line No."; Integer)
158  {
159  BlankZero = true;
160  Caption = 'External Equipment Line No.';
161  DataClassification = CustomerContent;
162  Editable = false;
163  ObsoleteReason = '#22688 field not needed, 1 worshop line can be linked to multiple Calc Ext Equipment lines';
164  ObsoleteState = Pending;
165  ObsoleteTag = '2402';
166  }
167  field(24; "Linked to External Equipment"; Boolean)
168  {
169  CalcFormula = exist("TSRD Calc. External Equipment" where("Workshop Line No." = field("Line No."),
170  "Forecast No." = field("Forecast No.")));
171  Caption = 'Linked to Additional Configuration';
172  Editable = false;
173  FieldClass = FlowField;
174  }
175  field(25; "Comments exist"; Boolean)
176  {
177  BlankZero = true;
178  CalcFormula = exist("TSRD Sale Forecast Comment" where("Comment Type" = const(Workshops), "No." = field("Forecast No."),
179  "Document Line No." = field("Line No.")));
180  Caption = 'Comments exist';
181  Editable = false;
182  FieldClass = FlowField;
183  }
184  field(30; "Service Order Type"; Code[10])
185  {
186  Caption = 'Service Order Type';
187  TableRelation = "Service Order Type".Code where("TSR Service" = const(true));
188  }
189  field(31; "Capitalized Service"; Boolean)
190  {
191  CalcFormula = lookup("Service Order Type"."TSRD Capitalized Service" where("Code" = field("Service Order Type")));
192  Caption = 'Capitalized Service';
193  Editable = false;
194  FieldClass = FlowField;
195  }
196  field(35; "Responsibility Center"; Code[10])
197  {
198  Caption = 'Responsibility Center';
199  TableRelation = "Responsibility Center".Code;
200 
201  trigger OnLookup()
202  var
203  RespCenterSetupMgt: Codeunit "TSR Resp. Center Setup Mgt";
204  RespCenterCode: Code[10];
205  begin
206  RespCenterCode := RespCenterSetupMgt.LookUpRespCenter("TSR Resp. Center Area"::Service);
207  if RespCenterCode <> '' then
208  Rec.Validate("Responsibility Center", RespCenterCode);
209  end;
210 
211  trigger OnValidate()
212  var
213  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
214  RespCenterSetupMgt: Codeunit "TSR Resp. Center Setup Mgt";
215  begin
216  RespCenterSetupMgt.CheckRespCenter(Rec."Responsibility Center", "TSR Resp. Center Area"::Service);
217  CalcForecastMgt.SetLocationFromResponsibilityCenter(Rec."Location Code", Rec."Responsibility Center");
218  end;
219  }
220  field(40; "Location Code"; Code[10])
221  {
222  Caption = 'Location Code';
223  TableRelation = Location;
224  }
225  field(50; "Service Order Status"; Enum "TSRD Calc. Workshop Status")
226  {
227  Caption = 'Service Order Status';
228  DataClassification = CustomerContent;
229  Editable = false;
230  }
231+ field(100; "Charging Method"; Enum "TSRD Calc. Charging Method")
232+ {
233+ Caption = 'Charging Method';
234+ DataClassification = CustomerContent;
235+
236+ trigger OnValidate()
237+ begin
238+ if "Charging Method" = "Charging Method"::"Calc. Separately" then begin
239+ CalcForecast.Get("Forecast No.");
240+ CalcForecast.TestField("Fix Price allowed", false);
241+ "Show in Sales Document" := true;
242+ "Calculate Separately" := true;
243+ end else begin
244+ "Calculate Separately" := false;
245+ "Sales Price" := 0;
246+ "Margin %" := 0;
247+ "Margin Amount" := 0;
248+ end;
249+ end;
250+ }
251+ field(101; "Sales Price"; Decimal)
252+ {
253+ BlankZero = true;
254+ Caption = 'Sales Price';
255+ DataClassification = CustomerContent;
256+
257+ trigger OnValidate()
258+ begin
259+ TestChargingMethodSeparate();
260+ UpdateMarginFromSalesPrice();
261+ end;
262+ }
263+ field(102; "Margin %"; Decimal)
264+ {
265+ AutoFormatExpression = '<precision, 1:2><standard format,0>';
266+ AutoFormatType = 10;
267+ BlankZero = true;
268+ Caption = 'Margin %';
269+ CaptionClass = SalesReceivablesSetup.GetMarginCaption('', ' %');
270+ DataClassification = CustomerContent;
271+
272+ trigger OnValidate()
273+ begin
274+ TestChargingMethodSeparate();
275+ UpdateSalesPriceFromMarginPercentage();
276+ end;
277+ }
278+ field(103; "Margin Amount"; Decimal)
279+ {
280+ BlankZero = true;
281+ Caption = 'Margin Amount';
282+ CaptionClass = SalesReceivablesSetup.GetMarginCaption();
283+ DataClassification = CustomerContent;
284+
285+ trigger OnValidate()
286+ begin
287+ TestChargingMethodSeparate();
288+ "Sales Price" := "Total Amount" + "Margin Amount";
289+ UpdateMarginFromSalesPrice();
290+ end;
291+ }
292  }
293 
294  keys
295  {
296  key(PK; "Forecast No.", "Line No.")
297  {
298  Clustered = true;
299  }
300  key(TSRDShowInSales; "Forecast No.", "Show in Sales Document") { }
301  }
302 
303  var
304  CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
305+ SalesReceivablesSetup: Record "Sales & Receivables Setup";
306  HasCalcForecast: Boolean;
307  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
308 
309 
310 
311  trigger OnInsert()
312  var
313  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
314  begin
315  CalcForecast.TestSalesCalculationStatus();
316  TestForecastStatusOpen();
317  CalcForecastMgt.UpdateServiceActivitiesInForecast(Rec."Forecast No.");
318  end;
319 
320  trigger OnModify()
321  var
322  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
323  begin
324  CalcForecast.TestSalesCalculationStatus();
325  TestForecastStatusOpen();
326  CalcForecastMgt.UpdateServiceActivitiesInForecast(Rec."Forecast No.");
327  end;
328 
329  trigger OnDelete()
330  var
331  CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
332  begin
333  UnlinkExternalEquipmentAfterDelete();
334  CalcForecastMgt.UpdateServiceActivitiesInForecast(Rec."Forecast No.");
335  end;
336 
337  internal procedure TestForecastStatusOpen()
338  begin
339  GetCalcForecast("Forecast No.");
340  CalcForecast.TestStatusOpen();
341  end;
342 
343  local procedure UnlinkExternalEquipmentAfterDelete()
344  var
345  CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
346  begin
347  CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Forecast No.", "Forecast No.");
348  CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Workshop Line No.", "Line No.");
349  if CalcExternalEquipment.IsEmpty() then
350  exit;
351  CalcExternalEquipment.ModifyAll("Workshop Line No.", 0);
352  end;
353 
354  local procedure UpdateTotalAmount()
355  begin
356  "Total Amount" := "Amount (Labor)" + "Amount (Parts)";
357+ if "Charging Method" = "Charging Method"::"Calc. Separately" then
358+ UpdateSalesPriceFromMarginPercentage();
359+ end;
360+
361+ local procedure TestChargingMethodSeparate()
362+ var
363+ ChargingMethodErr: Label 'Sales Price, Margin %% and Margin Amount can only be edited when %1 is %2.', Comment = '%1 = field caption, %2 = enum value';
364+ begin
365+ if "Charging Method" <> "Charging Method"::"Calc. Separately" then
366+ Error(ChargingMethodErr, FieldCaption("Charging Method"), Format("Charging Method"::"Calc. Separately"));
367+ end;
368+
369+ local procedure UpdateSalesPriceFromMarginPercentage()
370+ begin
371+ SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
372+ "Sales Price" := Round(CalcForecastMgt.GetSalesPriceWithMargin("Total Amount", "Margin %", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model"), 0.01);
373+ "Margin Amount" := "Sales Price" - "Total Amount";
374+ end;
375+
376+ local procedure UpdateMarginFromSalesPrice()
377+ begin
378+ SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
379+ "Margin Amount" := "Sales Price" - "Total Amount";
380+ "Margin %" := CalcForecastMgt.GetMarginPercentage("Total Amount", "Sales Price", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model");
381  end;
382 
383  internal procedure OpenLinkedServiceDocument()
384  var
385  ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header";
386  ServiceInvoiceHeader: Record "Service Invoice Header";
387  begin
388  case "Service Document Type" of
389  "Service Document Type"::Order:
390  if ServiceHeader.Get(ServiceHeader."Document Type"::Order, "Service Document No.") then
391  Page.Run(Page::"Service Order", ServiceHeader);
392  "Service Document Type"::Quote:
393  if ServiceHeader.Get(ServiceHeader."Document Type"::Quote, "Service Document No.") then
394  Page.Run(Page::"Service Quote", ServiceHeader);
395  "Service Document Type"::Invoice:
396  if ServiceInvoiceHeader.Get("Service Document No.") then
397  Page.Run(Page::"Posted Service Invoice", ServiceInvoiceHeader);
398  end
399  end;
400 
401  local procedure GetCalcForecast(ForecastNo: Code[20])
402  begin
403  if not HasCalcForecast then
404  HasCalcForecast := CalcForecast.Get(ForecastNo);
405  end;
406 
407  procedure GetNextLineNo(): Integer
408  var
409  CalcWorkshop: Record "TSRD Calc. Workshop";
410  begin
411  CalcWorkshop.SetRange("Forecast No.", Rec."Forecast No.");
412  if CalcWorkshop.IsEmpty() then
413  exit(10000);
414  CalcWorkshop.FindLast();
415  exit(CalcWorkshop."Line No." + 10000);
416  end;
417 
418  internal procedure InitOrderType()
419  var
420  ServiceOrderType: Record "Service Order Type";
421  UserSetup: Record "User Setup";
422  begin
423  UserSetup.Get(UserId());
424  if UserSetup."TSR Service Order Type" = '' then
425  exit;
426  if not ServiceOrderType.Get(UserSetup."TSR Service Order Type") then
427  exit;
428  if not ServiceOrderType."TSR Internal Invoicing" then
429  exit;
430  Rec.Validate("Service Order Type", UserSetup."TSR Service Order Type");
431  end;
432 
433  internal procedure InitResponsibilityCenter()
434  var
435  SalesReceivablesSetup: Record "Sales & Receivables Setup";
436  RespCenterSetupMgt: Codeunit "TSR Resp. Center Setup Mgt";
437  RespCenterCode: Code[10];
438  begin
439  SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
440  RespCenterCode := RespCenterSetupMgt.GetRespCenter("TSR Resp. Center Area"::Service, SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Internal Customer");
441  if RespCenterCode <> '' then
442  Rec.Validate("Responsibility Center", RespCenterCode);
443  end;
444 }

8  fields

11  field(1; "Forecast No."; Code[20])
12  {
13  Caption = 'Calculation Worksheet No.';

16  }
17  field(2; "Line No."; Integer)
18  {
19  Caption = 'Line No.';
20  }
21  field(6; "No."; Code[20])
22  {
23  Caption = 'No.';
24  OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
25  TableRelation = if (Type = const(Item)) Item."No."
26  else
27  if (Type = const("Service Item")) "Service Item"."No." where("TSRM In Stock As" = filter("Current Asset" | "Fixed Asset"))
28  else
29  if (Type = const(Comment)) "Standard Text".Code;
30  }
31  field(7; "Unit of Measure"; Code[10])
32  {
33  Caption = 'Unit of Measure';
34  TableRelation = if ("No." = filter(<> ''), Type = const(Item)) "Item Unit of Measure".Code where("Item No." = field("No."))
35  else
36  if ("No." = filter(<> ''), Type = const("Service Item")) "Service Item"."Unit of Measure Code" where("No." = field("No."))
37  else
38  "Unit of Measure".Code;
39  }

85  CalcFormula = exist("TSRD Forecast Comment Arch." where("Comment Type" = const(Workshops), "No." = field("Forecast No."),
86  "Document Line No." = field("Line No."), "Document Version No." = field("Document Version No.")));
87  Caption = 'Comments exist';
88  Editable = false;
89  FieldClass = FlowField;
90  }
91  field(30; "Service Order Type"; Code[10])
92  {
93  Caption = 'Service Order Type';
94  TableRelation = "Service Order Type".Code where("TSR Service" = const(true));
95  }

98  CalcFormula = lookup("Service Order Type"."TSRD Capitalized Service" where("Code" = field("Service Order Type")));

101  FieldClass = FlowField;
102  }
